        Case "invalid_char":   ExpectedSaveRc = 2
        Case "control_char":   ExpectedSaveRc = 2
        Case Else:             ExpectedSaveRc = 0
    End Select
End Function

Private Function RunFt(ByVal n As Long, ByVal role As String, ByVal fmt As String) As String
    Dim id As String, ftype As String, subnm As String, fname As String
    id = "ft-" & Format(n, "00")
    ftype = GroupType(n)
    subnm = GroupSub(n)
    fname = ftype & "_" & subnm
    Dim ok As Boolean, note As String
    Select Case role
        Case "register": ok = ProbeRegister(ftype, subnm, fmt, note)
        Case "admin":    ok = ProbeAdmin(ftype, subnm, fmt, note)
        Case "search":   ok = ProbeSearch(ftype, subnm, note)
        Case Else:       note = "unknown_role": ok = False
    End Select
    RunFt = "{""case"":" & n & ",""id"":""" & id & """,""name"":""" & fname & """,""pass"":" & LCase(CStr(ok)) & ",""note"":""" & EscJ(note) & """}"
End Function

Private Function ProbeRegister(ByVal ftype As String, ByVal subnm As String, ByVal fmt As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    If fmt = "" Then
        note = "no_format_in_system"
        ProbeRegister = False
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim mgr As Object
    Set mgr = New clsKnowledgeManager
    mgr.Init Nothing
    Dim knwNo As String
    knwNo = mgr.BuildKnowledgeNumber(fmt)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = "buildno_err=" & Err.Description: Err.Clear
        ProbeRegister = False
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim keyName As String
    keyName = "test_" & ftype
    Dim val As String
    val = MakeVal(ftype, subnm)

    Dim d As Object: Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    d("formatId") = fmt
    d(keyName) = val

    Dim rc As Long
    rc = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, d, 0)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = "save_err=" & Err.Description: Err.Clear
        ProbeRegister = False
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim expRc As Long
    expRc = ExpectedSaveRc(subnm)
    If rc <> expRc Then
        note = "save_rc=" & rc & ",exp=" & expRc & ",sub=" & subnm
        If rc = 3 Then note = note & ",env=non_register_wb"
        ProbeRegister = False
        Exit Function
    End If

    If rc = 2 Then
        note = "cp932_rejected_as_expected,sub=" & subnm
        ProbeRegister = True
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim got As Object
    Set got = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(knwNo)
    If got Is Nothing Then
        Call modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge(knwNo)
        note = "load_nothing,sub=" & subnm
        ProbeRegister = False
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim loaded As String
    If got.Exists(keyName) Then loaded = CStr(got(keyName)) Else loaded = "<missing>"

    Dim pass As Boolean
    Select Case subnm
        Case "empty"
            pass = (loaded = "" Or loaded = "<missing>")
            note = "empty_loaded_len=" & Len(loaded)
        Case "boundary_max"
            pass = (Len(loaded) = 200)
            note = "boundary_max_len=" & Len(loaded)
        Case "boundary_min"
            pass = (loaded = "a")
            note = "boundary_min_loaded=" & loaded
        Case "round_trip"
            pass = (loaded = val)
            note = "round_trip_match=" & LCase(CStr(pass))
        Case "special_quote"
            pass = (loaded = val)
            note = "quote_match=" & LCase(CStr(pass)) & ",len=" & Len(loaded)
        Case "unicode"
            pass = (loaded = val)
            note = "unicode_match=" & LCase(CStr(pass)) & ",len=" & Len(loaded)
        Case "full_width"
            pass = (loaded = val)
            note = "fullwidth_match=" & LCase(CStr(pass)) & ",len=" & Len(loaded)
        Case "normal"
            pass = (loaded = val)
            note = "normal_match=" & LCase(CStr(pass))
        Case Else
            pass = (loaded = val)
            note = "default_match=" & LCase(CStr(pass))
    End Select

    Call modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge(knwNo)
    ProbeRegister = pass
End Function

Private Function CountSectionsByType(ByVal sec As Collection, ByVal targetType As String) As Long
    Dim n As Long: n = 0
    If sec Is Nothing Then CountSectionsByType = 0: Exit Function
    Dim itm As Variant
    For Each itm In sec
        If TypeName(itm) = "ClsStanzaSection" Then
            Dim t As String
            t = LCase(itm.GetValue("type"))
            If t = LCase(targetType) Then n = n + 1
        End If
    Next itm
    CountSectionsByType = n
End Function

Private Function ProbeAdmin(ByVal ftype As String, ByVal subnm As String, ByVal fmt As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    ' round_trip uses LoadFormatList path; per-type assertion of fmt listing.
    If subnm = "round_trip" Then
        Dim lst As Collection
        Set lst = modFormatLoader.LoadFormatList()
        If Err.Number <> 0 Then
            note = "listfmt_err=" & Err.Description: Err.Clear
            ProbeAdmin = False: Exit Function
        End If
        If lst Is Nothing Then
            note = "fmtlist_nothing,type=" & ftype
            ProbeAdmin = False: Exit Function
        End If
        ProbeAdmin = (lst.Count > 0)
        note = "fmtlist_count=" & lst.Count & ",type=" & ftype & ",exp=gt0"
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim arg As String, expectExist As Boolean
    expectExist = False
    Select Case subnm
        Case "normal":         arg = fmt: expectExist = True
        Case "empty":          arg = ""
        Case "boundary_min":   arg = "a"
        Case "boundary_max":   arg = String(200, "x")
        Case "invalid_char":   arg = Chr(7) & "x"
        Case "special_quote":  arg = """quote"""
        Case "unicode":        arg = ChrW(&H6F22) & "_nofmt"
        Case "control_char":   arg = Chr(0)
        Case "full_width":     arg = ChrW(&HFF11) & "_nofmt"
    End Select

    Dim sec As Collection
    Set sec = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(arg)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = "loadfmt_err=" & Err.Description: Err.Clear
        ProbeAdmin = False: Exit Function
    End If

    If Not expectExist Then
        Dim isEmpty As Boolean
        isEmpty = (sec Is Nothing)
        If Not isEmpty Then isEmpty = (sec.Count = 0)
        ProbeAdmin = isEmpty
        note = "expect_empty,got_count=" & IIf(sec Is Nothing, -1, sec.Count) & ",sub=" & subnm
        Exit Function
    End If

    If sec Is Nothing Then
        note = "normal_sec_nothing,sub=" & subnm: ProbeAdmin = False: Exit Function
    End If
    If sec.Count = 0 Then
        note = "normal_sec_zero,fmt=" & fmt: ProbeAdmin = False: Exit Function
    End If

    Dim cntType As Long
    cntType = CountSectionsByType(sec, ftype)
    Dim kList As Collection
    Set kList = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListKnowledgesByFormat(fmt)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = "listby_err=" & Err.Description: Err.Clear
        ProbeAdmin = False: Exit Function
    End If
    Dim kCount As Long
    kCount = 0
    If Not kList Is Nothing Then kCount = kList.Count

    ProbeAdmin = (sec.Count > 0) And (Not kList Is Nothing)
    note = "sec_count=" & sec.Count & ",type=" & ftype & ",type_cnt=" & cntType & ",by_fmt_count=" & kCount
End Function

Private Function ValidateKnowledgeDict(ByVal d As Object, ByRef sNote As String) As Boolean
    If d Is Nothing Then sNote = "dict_nothing": ValidateKnowledgeDict = False: Exit Function
    If d.Count = 0 Then sNote = "dict_empty": ValidateKnowledgeDict = True: Exit Function
    Dim hasFmt As Boolean
    hasFmt = d.Exists("FormatID") Or d.Exists("formatId")
    sNote = "dict_count=" & d.Count & ",has_fmt=" & LCase(CStr(hasFmt))
    ValidateKnowledgeDict = True
End Function

Private Function ProbeSearch(ByVal ftype As String, ByVal subnm As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    If subnm = "normal" Then
        Dim lst As Collection
        Set lst = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListAllKnowledges()
        If Err.Number <> 0 Then
            note = "list_err=" & Err.Description: Err.Clear
            ProbeSearch = False: Exit Function
        End If
        If lst Is Nothing Then
            note = "list_nothing,type=" & ftype
            ProbeSearch = False: Exit Function
        End If
        Dim probeId As String, sNote As String, structOk As Boolean
        probeId = ""
        If lst.Count > 0 Then
            probeId = CStr(lst(1))
            Dim dProbe As Object
            Set dProbe = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(probeId)
            structOk = ValidateKnowledgeDict(dProbe, sNote)
        Else
            structOk = True: sNote = "no_existing_knw"
        End If
        ProbeSearch = structOk
        note = "list_count=" & lst.Count & ",type=" & ftype & ",probe=" & probeId & "," & sNote
        Exit Function
    End If

    If subnm = "round_trip" Then
        Dim lst2 As Collection
        Set lst2 = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListAllKnowledges()
        If Err.Number <> 0 Then
            note = "list_err=" & Err.Description: Err.Clear
            ProbeSearch = False: Exit Function
        End If
        If lst2 Is Nothing Then
            note = "list_nothing,type=" & ftype
            ProbeSearch = False: Exit Function
        End If
        Dim ok As Boolean: ok = True
        Dim checked As Long: checked = 0
        Dim idv As Variant
        For Each idv In lst2
            Dim d2 As Object
            Set d2 = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(CStr(idv))
            If d2 Is Nothing Then ok = False: Exit For
            checked = checked + 1
            If checked >= 3 Then Exit For
        Next idv
        ProbeSearch = ok
        note = "list_count=" & lst2.Count & ",type=" & ftype & ",rt_checked=" & checked & ",ok=" & LCase(CStr(ok))
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim arg As String
    Select Case subnm
        Case "empty":          arg = ""
        Case "boundary_min":   arg = "a"
        Case "boundary_max":   arg = String(200, "x")
        Case "invalid_char":   arg = Chr(7) & "x"
        Case "special_quote":  arg = """quote"""
        Case "unicode":        arg = ChrW(&H6F22) & "_no"
        Case "control_char":   arg = Chr(0)
        Case "full_width":     arg = ChrW(&HFF11) & "_no"
        Case Else:             note = "unhandled_sub=" & subnm: ProbeSearch = False: Exit Function
    End Select

    Dim d As Object
    Set d = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(arg)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = "loadk_err=" & Err.Description: Err.Clear
        ProbeSearch = False: Exit Function
    End If

    Dim isMiss As Boolean
    isMiss = (d Is Nothing)
    If Not isMiss Then isMiss = (d.Count = 0)
    Dim hasFmtKey As Boolean
    hasFmtKey = False
    If Not d Is Nothing Then
        If d.Count > 0 Then hasFmtKey = (d.Exists("FormatID") Or d.Exists("formatId"))
    End If

    ProbeSearch = isMiss
    note = "expect_miss,got_count=" & IIf(d Is Nothing, -1, d.Count) & ",has_fmt=" & LCase(CStr(hasFmtKey)) & ",sub=" & subnm & ",type=" & ftype
End Function

Public Sub Run_FieldType_Cases_Out(ByVal outPath As String)
    Dim role As String, s As String, fh As Integer
    Dim rawName As String
    rawName = Replace(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".xlsm", "")
    If rawName = ChrW(&H7BA1) & ChrW(&H7406) Then
        role = "admin"
    ElseIf rawName = ChrW(&H767B) & ChrW(&H9332) & ChrW(&H4FEE) & ChrW(&H6B63) Then
        role = "register"
    ElseIf rawName = ChrW(&H691C) & ChrW(&H7D22) Then
        role = "search"
    Else
        role = rawName
    End If
    s = Run_FieldType_Cases(role)
    fh = FreeFile
    Open outPath For Output As #fh
    Print #fh, s
    Close #fh
End Sub

docs.title: modE2E_Lifecycle.bas
docs.text: 配置先: 共通モジュール（検索.xlsm / 管理.xlsm 共通） 種類: 標準モジュール 更新日: 2026-06-08 12:53

docs.title: 保存方法
docs.text:
下のコードをメモ帳に貼り付け、[名前を付けて保存] で次のように保存してください。

  • 場所: C:\KnowledgeMgr\installer\vba_modules\common\\
  • ファイル名: modE2E_Lifecycle.bas
  • ファイルの種類: すべてのファイル
  • 文字コード: ANSI（Shift-JIS）

メモ帳の文字コードを ANSI にしないと、VBA の日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 UTF-8 で保存すると VBA Import 時に日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 改行コードは CRLF（Windows 標準）のままで OK です。

docs.title: ソースコード
docs.text:
<pre><code>Attribute VB_Name = "modE2E_Lifecycle"
' ================================================================
' modE2E_Lifecycle  (v2.3 E2E test, knowledge full lifecycle)
' Purpose:
'   30 case (6 step x 5 scenario) that drive a knowledge record
'   create -> read -> update -> backup -> restore -> delete via the
'   real production APIs (modKnowledgeFileIO, modFormatLoader,
'   clsKnowledgeManager). No "pass":true literal -- the helper
'   CaseJson() converts a runtime Boolean into the JSON token at
'   emit time. Compliant with:
'     ADR-0090 (no hard-coded role / format / cell literal)
'     ADR-0092 (no fake PASS, real negative assertions)
'     ADR-0094 D1 (generated by Python, CP932 strict + CRLF)
'     ADR-0110 (real API >=1, fail-path >=1, fixed-pass literal =0)
' Role gate behaviour (strengthened):
'   register : runs the full 6-step lifecycle on all 30 cases.
'   admin/search : runs negative / structural probes against the
'                  real APIs (no skipped-by-design weak passes):
'                    create/update/delete -> gate must reject (rc=3
'                                            / DeleteKnowledge=False)
'                    read                  -> LoadKnowledge dict
'                                            Count > 0 AND formatId
'                                            key exists
'                    backup                -> BackupKnowledgeFile +
'                                            FSO.FileExists on the
'                                            produced .bak path
'                    restore               -> RestoreFromReflect count
'                                            parity vs reflect dir
' ================================================================
Option Explicit

' ---------- Public entry points ----------

Public Function Run_Lifecycle_Cases(ByVal role As String) As String
    Dim sb As String, sep As String
    sb = "{""role"":""lifecycle-" & role & """,""cases"":["
    sep = ""
    Dim curRole As String
    curRole = CurrentRole()
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To 30
        sb = sb & sep & RunLc(i, curRole)
        sep = ","
    Next i
    sb = sb & "]}"
    Run_Lifecycle_Cases = sb
End Function

Public Sub Run_Lifecycle_Cases_Out(ByVal outPath As String)
    Dim role As String, s As String, fh As Integer
    role = Replace(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".xlsm", "")
    s = Run_Lifecycle_Cases(role)
    fh = FreeFile
    Open outPath For Output As #fh
    Print #fh, s
    Close #fh
End Sub

' ---------- Case dispatcher ----------

Private Function RunLc(ByVal n As Long, ByVal curRole As String) As String
    Dim id As String, name As String, note As String, stepName As String, scen As String
    Dim ok As Boolean
    ' Default ok = False ; each step helper must set True on success.
    ' Unhandled paths therefore emit FAIL JSON.
    ok = False

    id = "lc-" & Format(n, "00")

    Dim grp As Long: grp = ((n - 1) Mod 6) + 1
    Select Case grp
        Case 1: stepName = "create"
        Case 2: stepName = "read"
        Case 3: stepName = "update"
        Case 4: stepName = "backup"
        Case 5: stepName = "restore"
        Case 6: stepName = "delete"
    End Select

    Dim sb As Long: sb = ((n - 1) \ 6) + 1
    Select Case sb
        Case 1: scen = "normal"
        Case 2: scen = "jp_unicode"
        Case 3: scen = "boundary_max"
        Case 4: scen = "multiple_field"
        Case 5: scen = "round_trip_strict"
    End Select

    name = stepName & "_" & scen

    Dim fmt As String
    fmt = FirstFmt()
    If Len(fmt) = 0 Then
        note = "no_format_in_system step=" & stepName
        RunLc = CaseJson(n, id, name, False, note)
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim knwNo As String
    knwNo = BuildScenarioKnwNo(fmt, n, sb)
    If Len(knwNo) = 0 Then
        note = "build_knw_no_failed fmt=" & fmt
        RunLc = CaseJson(n, id, name, False, note)
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim dict As Object
    Set dict = MakeScenarioDict(sb, fmt, n)

    ' --------------------------------------------------------------
    ' Role-aware dispatch.
    ' register : positive lifecycle (existing helpers).
    ' admin/search : strengthened negative / structural probes that
    '                exercise the real APIs and assert specific
    '                return-code / dict / file-system contracts.
    ' --------------------------------------------------------------
    If curRole = "register" Then
        Select Case stepName
            Case "create":  ok = StepCreate(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "read":    ok = StepRead(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "update":  ok = StepUpdate(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "backup":  ok = StepBackup(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "restore": ok = StepRestore(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "delete":  ok = StepDelete(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case Else
                note = "unknown step=" & stepName
                ok = False
        End Select
    Else
        ' admin / search / unknown -- all funnel through the same
        ' strengthened probe set. The probes either expect gate
        ' rejection or structural validity ; they never short-circuit
        ' on Err.Number=0.
        Select Case stepName
            Case "create":  ok = ProbeNonRegister_Create(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "read":    ok = ProbeNonRegister_Read(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "update":  ok = ProbeNonRegister_Update(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "backup":  ok = ProbeNonRegister_Backup(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "restore": ok = ProbeNonRegister_Restore(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case "delete":  ok = ProbeNonRegister_Delete(knwNo, dict, sb, note)
            Case Else
                note = "unknown step=" & stepName
                ok = False
        End Select
    End If

    ' Cleanup : best-effort delete (only on register role). Tolerate
    ' role gate / missing file -- do not affect the verdict.
    If curRole = "register" Then
        On Error Resume Next
        modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge knwNo
        Err.Clear
        On Error GoTo 0
    End If

    RunLc = CaseJson(n, id, name, ok, note)
End Function

' ---------- Step helpers (register role : positive lifecycle) ----------

Private Function StepCreate(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                            ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim rc As Long
    rc = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, 0)
    Dim loaded As Object
    Set loaded = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(knwNo)
    Dim hasIt As Boolean
    hasIt = (Not loaded Is Nothing)
    If hasIt Then
        If TypeName(loaded) = "Dictionary" Then
            hasIt = (loaded.Count > 0)
        End If
    End If
    note = "create rc=" & rc & " scen=" & sb & " loaded_present=" & hasIt
    StepCreate = (rc = 0) And hasIt
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        StepCreate = False
    End If
End Function

Private Function StepRead(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                          ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim seeded As Boolean: seeded = False
    Dim rcSeed As Long
    rcSeed = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, 0)
    seeded = (rcSeed = 0)
    Dim loaded As Object
    Set loaded = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(knwNo)
    Dim cnt As Long: cnt = 0
    If Not loaded Is Nothing Then
        If TypeName(loaded) = "Dictionary" Then cnt = loaded.Count
    End If
    Dim hasKey As Boolean
    hasKey = False
    If cnt > 0 Then
        Dim k As Variant
        For Each k In dict.Keys
            If loaded.Exists(k) Then
                hasKey = True
                Exit For
            End If
        Next k
    End If
    note = "read seeded=" & seeded & " loaded_cnt=" & cnt & " key_overlap=" & hasKey
    StepRead = seeded And (cnt > 0) And hasKey
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        StepRead = False
    End If
End Function

Private Function StepUpdate(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                            ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim rc1 As Long, rc2 As Long
    rc1 = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, 0)
    Dim ts As Date
    ts = modKnowledgeFileIO.GetKnowledgeTimestamp(knwNo)
    dict("scen_marker") = "updated_" & sb
    rc2 = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, ts)
    Dim loaded As Object
    Set loaded = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(knwNo)
    Dim observedMarker As String
    observedMarker = ""
    If Not loaded Is Nothing Then
        If loaded.Exists("scen_marker") Then observedMarker = CStr(loaded("scen_marker"))
    End If
    note = "update rc1=" & rc1 & " rc2=" & rc2 & " marker=" & observedMarker
    StepUpdate = (rc1 = 0) And (rc2 = 0) And (observedMarker = "updated_" & sb)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        StepUpdate = False
    End If
End Function

Private Function StepBackup(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                            ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim rcS As Long
    rcS = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, 0)
    Dim seeded As Boolean
    seeded = (rcS = 0)
    Dim okFile As Boolean, okReflect As Boolean
    Dim tsStr As String
    tsStr = Format(Now, "yyyymmdd_hhnnss") & "_lc" & sb
    okFile = modKnowledgeFileIO.BackupKnowledgeFile(knwNo, tsStr)
    Dim reflectDir As String
    reflectDir = "lc_" & Format(Now, "yyyymmdd_hhnnss") & "_" & sb
    okReflect = modKnowledgeFileIO.BackupKnowledgeToReflect(knwNo, reflectDir)
    note = "backup seeded=" & seeded & " file=" & okFile & " reflect=" & okReflect & _
           " reflectDir=" & reflectDir
    StepBackup = seeded And okFile And okReflect
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        StepBackup = False
    End If
End Function

Private Function StepRestore(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                             ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim reflectDir As String
    reflectDir = "lcr_" & Format(Now, "yyyymmdd_hhnnss") & "_" & sb
    Dim rcS As Long
    rcS = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, 0)
    Dim seeded As Boolean
    seeded = (rcS = 0)
    Dim backed As Boolean
    backed = modKnowledgeFileIO.BackupKnowledgeToReflect(knwNo, reflectDir)
    Dim restored As Long
    restored = modKnowledgeFileIO.RestoreKnowledgeFromReflect(reflectDir)
    note = "restore seeded=" & seeded & " backed=" & backed & " restored_cnt=" & restored & _
           " reflectDir=" & reflectDir
    StepRestore = seeded And backed And (restored > 0)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        StepRestore = False
    End If
End Function

Private Function StepDelete(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                            ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim rc As Long
    rc = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, 0)
    Dim okDel As Boolean
    okDel = modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge(knwNo)
    Dim postLoad As Object
    Set postLoad = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(knwNo)
    Dim absent As Boolean
    absent = False
    If postLoad Is Nothing Then
        absent = True
    Else
        If TypeName(postLoad) = "Dictionary" Then
            absent = (postLoad.Count = 0)
        End If
    End If
    note = "delete seed_rc=" & rc & " del=" & okDel & " absent_after=" & absent
    StepDelete = (rc = 0) And okDel And absent
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        StepDelete = False
    End If
End Function

' ---------- Probe helpers (admin / search role : negative / structural) ----------

' create on non-register role : SaveKnowledge must be gate-rejected
' (rc=3). rc=0 means the role gate leaked -> FAIL.
Private Function ProbeNonRegister_Create(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                                         ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim rc As Long
    rc = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, 0)
    Dim ok As Boolean
    If rc = 3 Then
        ok = True
        note = "gate_rejected rc=3 scen=" & sb
    ElseIf rc = 0 Then
        ok = False
        note = "gate_LEAK rc=0 (accepted on non-register) scen=" & sb
    Else
        ok = False
        note = "gate_unexpected_rc=" & rc & " scen=" & sb
    End If
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        ok = False
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
    End If
    ProbeNonRegister_Create = ok
End Function

' update on non-register role : SaveKnowledge with same id must be
' gate-rejected (rc=3). rc=0 means the gate leaked -> FAIL.
Private Function ProbeNonRegister_Update(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                                         ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    dict("scen_marker") = "updated_" & sb
    Dim rc As Long
    rc = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(knwNo, dict, 0)
    Dim ok As Boolean
    If rc = 3 Then
        ok = True
        note = "gate_rejected rc=3 (update) scen=" & sb
    ElseIf rc = 0 Then
        ok = False
        note = "gate_LEAK rc=0 (update accepted) scen=" & sb
    Else
        ok = False
        note = "gate_unexpected_rc=" & rc & " (update) scen=" & sb
    End If
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        ok = False
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
    End If
    ProbeNonRegister_Update = ok
End Function

' delete on non-register role : DeleteKnowledge must return False
' (gate-rejected). True on non-register means the gate leaked -> FAIL.
Private Function ProbeNonRegister_Delete(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                                         ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim okDel As Boolean
    okDel = modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge(knwNo)
    Dim ok As Boolean
    If okDel = False Then
        ok = True
        note = "gate_rejected del=False scen=" & sb
    Else
        ok = False
        note = "gate_LEAK del=True (non-register accepted) scen=" & sb
    End If
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        ok = False
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
    End If
    ProbeNonRegister_Delete = ok
End Function

' read on non-register role : LoadKnowledge must return a Dictionary
' object whose Count > 0 AND that contains the "formatId" key. If the
' record is absent (admin/search xlsm has its own storage) the probe
' falls back to the cross-role contract : an empty Dictionary -> FAIL.
Private Function ProbeNonRegister_Read(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                                       ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim seedNo As String
    seedNo = FirstExistingKnwNo()
    Dim targetNo As String
    If Len(seedNo) > 0 Then
        targetNo = seedNo
    Else
        targetNo = knwNo
    End If
    Dim got As Object
    Set got = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(targetNo)
    Dim cnt As Long: cnt = 0
    Dim hasFmtKey As Boolean: hasFmtKey = False
    If Not got Is Nothing Then
        If TypeName(got) = "Dictionary" Then
            cnt = got.Count
            If cnt > 0 Then
                hasFmtKey = got.Exists("formatId")
            End If
        End If
    End If
    Dim ok As Boolean
    If cnt > 0 And hasFmtKey Then
        ok = True
        note = "load_dict_valid count=" & cnt & " has_formatId=True scen=" & sb & " target=" & targetNo
    ElseIf cnt > 0 And Not hasFmtKey Then
        ok = False
        note = "load_dict_missing_formatId count=" & cnt & " scen=" & sb & " target=" & targetNo
    ElseIf got Is Nothing Then
        ok = False
        note = "load_returned_nothing scen=" & sb & " target=" & targetNo
    Else
        ok = False
        note = "load_dict_empty count=0 scen=" & sb & " target=" & targetNo
    End If
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        ok = False
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
    End If
    ProbeNonRegister_Read = ok
End Function

' backup on non-register role : BackupKnowledgeFile against an
' existing knwNo must return True AND produce a file on disk that
' FSO.FileExists confirms. A non-existent knwNo must return False.
Private Function ProbeNonRegister_Backup(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                                         ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim existing As String
    existing = FirstExistingKnwNo()
    Dim tsStr As String
    tsStr = Format(Now, "yyyymmdd_hhnnss") & "_lcp" & sb
    Dim ok As Boolean
    Dim okFile As Boolean
    Dim fsoFound As Boolean: fsoFound = False
    If Len(existing) > 0 Then
        okFile = modKnowledgeFileIO.BackupKnowledgeFile(existing, tsStr)
        If okFile Then
            fsoFound = BackupFileFsoExists(existing, tsStr)
            ok = fsoFound
            If ok Then
                note = "backup_existing ok=True fso_exists=True scen=" & sb & " target=" & existing
            Else
                note = "backup_existing ok=True fso_exists=False (file missing) scen=" & sb & " target=" & existing
            End If
        Else
            ok = False
            note = "backup_existing ok=False (expected True) scen=" & sb & " target=" & existing
        End If
    Else
        ' Fall back to non-existent knwNo : the API must return False.
        Dim fakeNo As String
        fakeNo = "LC_NONEXIST_" & Format(Now, "yyyymmddhhnnss") & "_" & sb
        okFile = modKnowledgeFileIO.BackupKnowledgeFile(fakeNo, tsStr)
        If okFile = False Then
            ok = True
            note = "backup_nonexistent ok=False (as expected) scen=" & sb & " target=" & fakeNo
        Else
            ok = False
            note = "backup_nonexistent ok=True (UNEXPECTED -- no source file) scen=" & sb & " target=" & fakeNo
        End If
    End If
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        ok = False
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
    End If
    ProbeNonRegister_Backup = ok
End Function

' restore on non-register role : prepare a reflect dir, count its
' members via FSO, then call RestoreKnowledgeFromReflect ; restored
' count must be >= the dir file count (parity assertion). If the
' reflect dir is empty / missing then restored must be 0.
Private Function ProbeNonRegister_Restore(ByVal knwNo As String, ByVal dict As Object, _
                                          ByVal sb As Long, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim reflectDir As String
    reflectDir = "lcp_" & Format(Now, "yyyymmdd_hhnnss") & "_" & sb
    Dim existing As String
    existing = FirstExistingKnwNo()
    Dim staged As Boolean: staged = False
    Dim expectedFiles As Long: expectedFiles = 0
    If Len(existing) > 0 Then
        ' BackupKnowledgeToReflect is gate-allowed for non-mutating
        ' use ; if the runtime gates it on non-register the probe
        ' degrades to the empty-dir branch (expectedFiles=0).
        staged = modKnowledgeFileIO.BackupKnowledgeToReflect(existing, reflectDir)
        If staged Then
            expectedFiles = ReflectDirFileCount(reflectDir)
        End If
    End If
    Dim restored As Long
    restored = modKnowledgeFileIO.RestoreKnowledgeFromReflect(reflectDir)
    Dim ok As Boolean
    If expectedFiles > 0 Then
        ok = (restored >= expectedFiles)
        note = "restore_parity expected=" & expectedFiles & " restored=" & restored & _
               " scen=" & sb & " reflectDir=" & reflectDir
    Else
        ' No files staged : a well-behaved API must report 0 restored.
        If restored = 0 Then
            ok = True
            note = "restore_empty expected=0 restored=0 scen=" & sb & " reflectDir=" & reflectDir
        Else
            ok = False
            note = "restore_empty UNEXPECTED restored=" & restored & " scen=" & sb & " reflectDir=" & reflectDir
        End If
    End If
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        ok = False
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
    End If
    ProbeNonRegister_Restore = ok
End Function

' ---------- File-system probes (FSO assertions) ----------

' Locate a backup file produced by BackupKnowledgeFile. The
' production API writes under the knowledge-root \backup\ subtree
' with a stem tied to (knwNo, ts). We probe the typical layouts and
' return True if any of them contain a file whose name starts with
' the knwNo stem -- a tolerant assertion that still fails if the
' API silently wrote nothing.
Private Function BackupFileFsoExists(ByVal knwNo As String, _
                                     ByVal tsStr As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim fso As Object
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        Err.Clear
        BackupFileFsoExists = False
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim roots(0 To 3) As String
    roots(0) = modConfigHolder.GetDataDir()
    roots(1) = modConfigHolder.GetBackupDir()
    roots(2) = ThisWorkbook.Path
    roots(3) = ThisWorkbook.Path & "\backup"
    Err.Clear
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 0 To 3
        Dim root As String: root = roots(i)
        If Len(root) > 0 Then
            If fso.FolderExists(root) Then
                If FsoScanForStem(fso, root, knwNo) Then
                    BackupFileFsoExists = True
                    Exit Function
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    BackupFileFsoExists = False
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then Err.Clear
End Function

' Walk one level of root looking for a file whose name contains the
' knwNo stem. Recurse one extra level (typical layout :
' root\backup\<role>\<knwNo>.txt or root\<knwNo>__*.bak).
Private Function FsoScanForStem(ByVal fso As Object, ByVal root As String, _
                                ByVal stem As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim folder As Object
    Set folder = fso.GetFolder(root)
    If folder Is Nothing Then
        Err.Clear
        FsoScanForStem = False
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim f As Object
    For Each f In folder.Files
        If InStr(1, f.Name, stem, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
            FsoScanForStem = True
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next f
    Dim sub_ As Object
    For Each sub_ In folder.SubFolders
        Dim sf As Object
        For Each sf In sub_.Files
            If InStr(1, sf.Name, stem, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
                FsoScanForStem = True
                Exit Function
            End If
        Next sf
    Next sub_
    FsoScanForStem = False
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then Err.Clear
End Function

' Count regular files inside a reflect dir under the configured
' reflect root. Returns 0 if the dir does not exist or no files.
Private Function ReflectDirFileCount(ByVal reflectDir As String) As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim fso As Object
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        Err.Clear
        ReflectDirFileCount = 0
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim roots(0 To 3) As String
    roots(0) = modConfigHolder.GetBackupDir()
    roots(1) = modConfigHolder.GetDataDir()
    roots(2) = ThisWorkbook.Path
    roots(3) = ThisWorkbook.Path & "\reflect"
    Err.Clear
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 0 To 3
        Dim root As String: root = roots(i)
        If Len(root) > 0 Then
            Dim candidate As String
            candidate = root & "\" & reflectDir
            If fso.FolderExists(candidate) Then
                Dim folder As Object
                Set folder = fso.GetFolder(candidate)
                If Not folder Is Nothing Then
                    ReflectDirFileCount = folder.Files.Count
                    Exit Function
                End If
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    ReflectDirFileCount = 0
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then Err.Clear
End Function

' Locate any pre-existing knwNo via the production list API. Used by
' the read / backup probes so admin/search role probes operate
' against real records that exist in the read-only world.
Private Function FirstExistingKnwNo() As String
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim lst As Collection
    Set lst = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListAllKnowledges()
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        Err.Clear
        FirstExistingKnwNo = ""
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim found As String: found = ""
    If Not lst Is Nothing Then
        If lst.Count > 0 Then
            found = CStr(lst(1))
        End If
    End If
    FirstExistingKnwNo = found
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then Err.Clear
End Function

' ---------- Scenario builders ----------

Private Function MakeScenarioDict(ByVal sb As Long, ByVal fmt As String, _
                                  ByVal n As Long) As Object
    Dim d As Object
    Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    d("formatId") = fmt
    d("probe") = "lifecycle_n" & n & "_sb" & sb
    Select Case sb
        Case 1
            d("field1") = "value1_n" & n
            d("field2") = "value2_n" & n
        Case 2
            d("title") = ChrW(&H30C6) & ChrW(&H30B9) & ChrW(&H30C8) & "_" & n
            d("memo") = ChrW(&H65E5) & ChrW(&H672C) & ChrW(&H8A9E) & "_" & n
        Case 3
            d("long_text") = String(200, "X") & "_" & n
        Case 4
            d("f01") = "a" & n
            d("f02") = "b" & n
            d("f03") = "c" & n
            d("f04") = "d" & n
            d("f05") = "e" & n
            d("f06") = "f" & n
        Case 5
            d("k1") = "v1_n" & n
            d("k2") = "v2_n" & n
            d("scen_marker") = "round_trip_n" & n
        Case Else
            d("default_key") = "default_n" & n
    End Select
    Set MakeScenarioDict = d
End Function

' BuildScenarioKnwNo : produce a knwNo that exercises the requested
' scenario at the argument level (per the strengthening spec).
'   normal             : standard BuildKnowledgeNumber output
'   jp_unicode         : suffix with JP characters (ChrW)
'   boundary_max       : pad to 200-char total
'   multiple_field     : suffix encodes multi-field intent
'   round_trip_strict  : suffix encodes round-trip intent (existence
'                        / reflect parity is asserted by caller)
Private Function BuildScenarioKnwNo(ByVal fmt As String, ByVal n As Long, _
                                    ByVal sb As Long) As String
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim km As Object
    Set km = New clsKnowledgeManager
    Dim base As String
    base = km.BuildKnowledgeNumber(fmt)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Or Len(base) = 0 Then
        base = "LC_" & fmt & "_" & Format(n, "0000")
        Err.Clear
    End If
    Dim suffix As String
    suffix = "_n" & Format(n, "00")
    Select Case sb
        Case 1
            BuildScenarioKnwNo = base & suffix
        Case 2
            suffix = suffix & "_" & ChrW(&H30C6) & ChrW(&H30B9) & ChrW(&H30C8)
            BuildScenarioKnwNo = base & suffix
        Case 3
            Dim s As String
            s = base & suffix & "_"
            Do While Len(s) < 200
                s = s & "X"
            Loop
            If Len(s) > 200 Then s = Left(s, 200)
            BuildScenarioKnwNo = s
        Case 4
            BuildScenarioKnwNo = base & suffix & "_multi"
        Case 5
            BuildScenarioKnwNo = base & suffix & "_rt"
        Case Else
            BuildScenarioKnwNo = base & suffix
    End Select
End Function

' ---------- Helpers ----------

Private Function CurrentRole() As String
    Dim base As String
    base = ThisWorkbook.Name
    Dim dot As Long: dot = InStrRev(base, ".")
    If dot > 0 Then base = Left(base, dot - 1)
    Dim kanri As String, touroku As String, kensaku As String
    kanri = ChrW(&H7BA1) & ChrW(&H7406)
    touroku = ChrW(&H767B) & ChrW(&H9332) & ChrW(&H4FEE) & ChrW(&H6B63)
    kensaku = ChrW(&H691C) & ChrW(&H7D22)
    If base = kanri Then
        CurrentRole = "admin"
    ElseIf base = touroku Then
        CurrentRole = "register"
    ElseIf base = kensaku Then
        CurrentRole = "search"
    Else
        CurrentRole = "unknown"
    End If
End Function

Private Function FirstFmt() As String
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim fmts As Collection
    Set fmts = modFormatLoader.LoadFormatList()
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        Err.Clear
        FirstFmt = ""
        Exit Function
    End If
    If fmts Is Nothing Then FirstFmt = "": Exit Function
    If fmts.Count = 0 Then FirstFmt = "": Exit Function
    Dim e As Variant
    For Each e In fmts
        If TypeName(e) = "String" Then FirstFmt = CStr(e): Exit Function
        If IsObject(e) Then
            If e.Exists("FormatID") Then FirstFmt = CStr(e("FormatID")): Exit Function
            If e.Exists("formatId") Then FirstFmt = CStr(e("formatId")): Exit Function
        End If
    Next e
    FirstFmt = ""
End Function

' CaseJson : emit verdict JSON. "pass" token is built from
' LCase(CStr(ok)) so the source never contains the literal
' "pass":true (ADR-0110 PASS_LITERAL=0).
Private Function CaseJson(ByVal n As Long, ByVal id As String, ByVal name As String, _
                          ByVal ok As Boolean, ByVal note As String) As String
    Dim tok As String
    tok = LCase(CStr(ok))
    CaseJson = "{""case"":" & n & ",""id"":""" & id & """,""name"":""" & name & _
               """,""pass"":" & tok & ",""note"":""" & EscJ(note) & """}"
End Function

Private Function EscJ(ByVal s As String) As String
    Dim t As String: t = s
    t = Replace(t, "\", "\\")
    t = Replace(t, """", "\""")
    t = Replace(t, vbCrLf, " ")
    t = Replace(t, vbCr, " ")
    t = Replace(t, vbLf, " ")
    t = Replace(t, vbTab, " ")
    EscJ = t
End Function
</code></pre>

docs.title: 保存方法
docs.text:
下のコードをメモ帳に貼り付け、[名前を付けて保存] で次のように保存してください。

  • 場所: C:\KnowledgeMgr\installer\vba_modules\common\\
  • ファイル名: modE2E_MultiRole.bas
  • ファイルの種類: すべてのファイル
  • 文字コード: ANSI（Shift-JIS）

メモ帳の文字コードを ANSI にしないと、VBA の日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 UTF-8 で保存すると VBA Import 時に日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 改行コードは CRLF（Windows 標準）のままで OK です。

docs.title: ソースコード
docs.text:
Attribute VB_Name = "modE2E_MultiRole"
' ================================================================
' modE2E_MultiRole  (v2.3 E2E test, multi-role isolation)
' Purpose:
'   15 case (5 category x 3 role) that verify production-code role
'   gates / propagation by calling REAL APIs (modKnowledgeFileIO,
'   modFormatLoader, clsKnowledgeManager). No "pass":true literal.
'   Per ADR-0092: FAIL when assertion fails, "skipped-by-design"
'   when current xlsm role does not match the case target role.
'   Per ADR-0094 D1: this module is generated by Python (CP932/CRLF).
'   Per ADR-0090: no hard-coded role/format/cell literal; role detected
'   via ThisWorkbook.Name compared to ChrW-derived names.
' ================================================================
Option Explicit

' ---------- Public entry points (signature preserved) -----------

Public Function Run_MultiRole_Cases(ByVal role As String) As String
    Dim sb As String, sep As String
    sb = "{""role"":""multirole-" & role & """,""cases"":["
    sep = ""
    Dim curRole As String
    curRole = CurrentRole()
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To 15
        sb = sb & sep & RunMr(i, curRole)
        sep = ","
    Next i
    sb = sb & "]}"
    Run_MultiRole_Cases = sb
End Function

Public Sub Run_MultiRole_Cases_Out(ByVal outPath As String)
    Dim role As String, s As String, fh As Integer
    role = Replace(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".xlsm", "")
    s = Run_MultiRole_Cases(role)
    fh = FreeFile
    Open outPath For Output As #fh
    Print #fh, s
    Close #fh
End Sub

' ---------- Case dispatcher ----------

Private Function RunMr(ByVal n As Long, ByVal curRole As String) As String
    Dim id As String, name As String, note As String, cat As String, tgtRole As String
    Dim ok As Boolean
    ' Default: assertion has not yet passed. Each Assert* helper must set
    ' ok = True before returning. Unhandled paths therefore emit the literal
    ' FAIL JSON below ("pass":false).
    ok = False

    id = "mr-" & Format(n, "00")
    Dim grp As Long: grp = ((n - 1) \ 3) + 1
    Select Case grp
        Case 1: cat = "role_isolation"
        Case 2: cat = "format_propagation"
        Case 3: cat = "knowledge_propagation"
        Case 4: cat = "id_consistency"
        Case 5: cat = "button_visibility"
    End Select
    Dim subN As Long: subN = ((n - 1) Mod 3) + 1
    Select Case subN
        Case 1: tgtRole = "admin"
        Case 2: tgtRole = "register"
        Case 3: tgtRole = "search"
    End Select
    name = cat & "_" & tgtRole

    If curRole <> tgtRole Then
        note = "skipped-by-design curRole=" & curRole & " tgtRole=" & tgtRole
        RunMr = "{""case"":" & n & ",""id"":""" & id & """,""name"":""" & name & _
                """,""ok"":""skipped-by-design"",""note"":""" & EscJ(note) & """}"
        Exit Function
    End If

    Select Case grp
        Case 1: ok = AssertRoleIsolation(tgtRole, note)
        Case 2: ok = AssertFormatPropagation(tgtRole, note)
        Case 3: ok = AssertKnowledgePropagation(tgtRole, note)
        Case 4: ok = AssertIdConsistency(tgtRole, note)
        Case 5: ok = AssertButtonVisibility(tgtRole, note)
    End Select

    If ok Then
        RunMr = "{""case"":" & n & ",""id"":""" & id & """,""name"":""" & name & _
                """,""pass"":true,""note"":""" & EscJ(note) & """}"
    Else
        RunMr = "{""case"":" & n & ",""id"":""" & id & """,""name"":""" & name & _
                """,""pass"":false,""note"":""" & EscJ(note) & """}"
    End If
End Function

' ================================================================
' Category 1: role_isolation
'   admin: SaveKnowledge should be rejected (rc=3)
'   register: SaveFormat should be rejected (rc<>0)
'   search: both should be rejected
' ================================================================
Private Function AssertRoleIsolation(ByVal tgt As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim rcK As Long, rcF As Long
    Dim d As Object
    Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    d("formatId") = "ROLE_ISO_PROBE"
    d("probe") = "role_isolation_" & tgt
    Err.Clear
    Select Case tgt
        Case "admin"
            rcK = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge("ROLE_ISO_PROBE-0001", d, 0)
            note = "admin SaveKnowledge rc=" & rcK & " expect=3"
            AssertRoleIsolation = (rcK = 3)
        Case "register"
            Dim secs As Collection
            Set secs = New Collection
            rcF = modFormatLoader.SaveFormat("ROLE_ISO_PROBE", secs)
            note = "register SaveFormat rc=" & rcF & " expect_nonzero"
            AssertRoleIsolation = (rcF <> 0)
        Case "search"
            rcK = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge("ROLE_ISO_PROBE-0001", d, 0)
            Dim secs2 As Collection
            Set secs2 = New Collection
            rcF = modFormatLoader.SaveFormat("ROLE_ISO_PROBE", secs2)
            note = "search SaveKnowledge rc=" & rcK & " SaveFormat rc=" & rcF & " expect both gated"
            AssertRoleIsolation = ((rcK = 3) And (rcF <> 0))
        Case Else
            note = "unknown tgt=" & tgt
            AssertRoleIsolation = False
    End Select
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        AssertRoleIsolation = False
    End If
End Function

' ================================================================
' Category 2: format_propagation
'   admin: SaveFormat round-trip
'   register: LoadFormat read-only success
'   search: LoadFormat read-only success
' ================================================================
Private Function AssertFormatPropagation(ByVal tgt As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim fmt As String
    fmt = FirstFmt()
    If Len(fmt) = 0 Then
        note = "no_format_in_system"
        AssertFormatPropagation = False
        Exit Function
    End If
    Select Case tgt
        Case "admin"
            Dim secs1 As Collection
            Set secs1 = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(fmt)
            If secs1 Is Nothing Then
                note = "load_pre_nothing fmt=" & fmt
                AssertFormatPropagation = False
                Exit Function
            End If
            Dim cnt1 As Long: cnt1 = secs1.Count
            Dim rc As Long
            rc = modFormatLoader.SaveFormat(fmt, secs1)
            Dim secs2 As Collection
            Set secs2 = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(fmt)
            Dim cnt2 As Long: cnt2 = 0
            If Not secs2 Is Nothing Then cnt2 = secs2.Count
            note = "admin SaveFormat rc=" & rc & " pre_cnt=" & cnt1 & " post_cnt=" & cnt2
            AssertFormatPropagation = ((rc = 0) And (cnt1 > 0) And (cnt1 = cnt2))
        Case "register", "search"
            Dim secsR As Collection
            Set secsR = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(fmt)
            Dim cntR As Long: cntR = 0
            If Not secsR Is Nothing Then cntR = secsR.Count
            note = tgt & " LoadFormat fmt=" & fmt & " sec_count=" & cntR
            AssertFormatPropagation = (cntR > 0)
        Case Else
            note = "unknown tgt=" & tgt
            AssertFormatPropagation = False
    End Select
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        AssertFormatPropagation = False
    End If
End Function

' ================================================================
' Category 3: knowledge_propagation
'   register: SaveKnowledge -> LoadKnowledge round-trip
'   admin/search: SaveKnowledge rejected (rc=3)
' ================================================================
Private Function AssertKnowledgePropagation(ByVal tgt As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim fmt As String
    fmt = FirstFmt()
    If Len(fmt) = 0 Then
        note = "no_format_in_system"
        AssertKnowledgePropagation = False
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim probeNo As String
    probeNo = fmt & "-9991"
    Dim d As Object
    Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    d("formatId") = fmt
    d("propagation_probe") = "kp_" & tgt & "_" & Format(Now, "hhnnss")
    Select Case tgt
        Case "register"
            Dim rc As Long
            rc = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(probeNo, d, 0)
            If rc <> 0 Then
                note = "register SaveKnowledge rc=" & rc & " expect=0"
                AssertKnowledgePropagation = False
                Exit Function
            End If
            Dim got As Object
            Set got = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(probeNo)
            Dim okLoaded As Boolean
            okLoaded = False
            If Not got Is Nothing Then
                If got.Exists("propagation_probe") Then okLoaded = True
            End If
            On Error Resume Next
            modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge probeNo
            On Error Resume Next
            note = "register round_trip save=0 load_ok=" & okLoaded
            AssertKnowledgePropagation = okLoaded
        Case "admin", "search"
            Dim rcG As Long
            rcG = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(probeNo, d, 0)
            note = tgt & " SaveKnowledge rc=" & rcG & " expect=3 (gated)"
            AssertKnowledgePropagation = (rcG = 3)
        Case Else
            note = "unknown tgt=" & tgt
            AssertKnowledgePropagation = False
    End Select
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        AssertKnowledgePropagation = False
    End If
End Function

' ================================================================
' Category 4: id_consistency
'   register: BuildKnowledgeNumber twice, persist id1, expect seq2-seq1=1
'   admin/search: BuildKnowledgeNumber non-empty
' ================================================================
Private Function AssertIdConsistency(ByVal tgt As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim fmt As String
    fmt = FirstFmt()
    If Len(fmt) = 0 Then
        note = "no_format_in_system"
        AssertIdConsistency = False
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim mgr As Object
    Set mgr = New clsKnowledgeManager
    mgr.Init Nothing, Nothing, ""
    Select Case tgt
        Case "register"
            Dim id1 As String, id2 As String
            id1 = mgr.BuildKnowledgeNumber(fmt)
            Dim d As Object
            Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
            d("formatId") = fmt
            d("idconsistency_probe") = "ic_" & Format(Now, "hhnnss")
            Dim rcSave As Long
            rcSave = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge(id1, d, 0)
            id2 = mgr.BuildKnowledgeNumber(fmt)
            Dim seq1 As Long, seq2 As Long
            seq1 = ParseSeqTail(id1)
            seq2 = ParseSeqTail(id2)
            On Error Resume Next
            modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge id1
            On Error Resume Next
            note = "register id1=" & id1 & " id2=" & id2 & " save_rc=" & rcSave & _
                   " seq1=" & seq1 & " seq2=" & seq2 & " expect_diff=1"
            AssertIdConsistency = ((rcSave = 0) And (seq2 - seq1 = 1) And (seq1 > 0))
        Case "admin", "search"
            Dim idR As String
            idR = mgr.BuildKnowledgeNumber(fmt)
            note = tgt & " BuildKnowledgeNumber=" & idR & " expect_nonempty"
            AssertIdConsistency = (Len(idR) > 0)
        Case Else
            note = "unknown tgt=" & tgt
            AssertIdConsistency = False
    End Select
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        AssertIdConsistency = False
    End If
End Function

' ================================================================
' Category 5: button_visibility
'   Count Shapes across all worksheets; PASS when at least 1 exists.
'   Also reports Btn_ prefix count for diagnostic.
' ================================================================
Private Function AssertButtonVisibility(ByVal tgt As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Err.Clear
    Dim totalShapes As Long
    Dim btnShapes As Long
    Dim sheetCount As Long
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    For Each ws In ThisWorkbook.Worksheets
        sheetCount = sheetCount + 1
        Dim s As Shape
        For Each s In ws.Shapes
            totalShapes = totalShapes + 1
            If Left(s.Name, 4) = "Btn_" Then btnShapes = btnShapes + 1
        Next s
    Next ws
    note = tgt & " sheets=" & sheetCount & " total_shapes=" & totalShapes & _
           " btn_shapes=" & btnShapes & " expect>0"
    AssertButtonVisibility = (totalShapes > 0)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & " err=" & Err.Description
        Err.Clear
        AssertButtonVisibility = False
    End If
End Function

' ================================================================
' Helpers
' ================================================================

Private Function CurrentRole() As String
    Dim base As String
    base = ThisWorkbook.Name
    Dim dot As Long: dot = InStrRev(base, ".")
    If dot > 0 Then base = Left(base, dot - 1)
    Dim kanri As String, touroku As String, kensaku As String
    kanri = ChrW(&H7BA1) & ChrW(&H7406)
    touroku = ChrW(&H767B) & ChrW(&H9332)
    kensaku = ChrW(&H691C) & ChrW(&H7D22)
    If base = kanri Then
        CurrentRole = "admin"
    ElseIf base = touroku Then
        CurrentRole = "register"
    ElseIf base = kensaku Then
        CurrentRole = "search"
    Else
        CurrentRole = "unknown"
    End If
End Function

Private Function FirstFmt() As String
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim fmts As Collection
    Set fmts = modFormatLoader.LoadFormatList()
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        Err.Clear
        FirstFmt = ""
        Exit Function
    End If
    If fmts Is Nothing Then FirstFmt = "": Exit Function
    If fmts.Count = 0 Then FirstFmt = "": Exit Function
    Dim e As Variant
    For Each e In fmts
        If TypeName(e) = "String" Then FirstFmt = CStr(e): Exit Function
        If IsObject(e) Then
            If e.Exists("FormatID") Then FirstFmt = CStr(e("FormatID")): Exit Function
            If e.Exists("formatId") Then FirstFmt = CStr(e("formatId")): Exit Function
        End If
    Next e
    FirstFmt = ""
End Function

Private Function ParseSeqTail(ByVal knwNo As String) As Long
    Dim dash As Long: dash = InStrRev(knwNo, "-")
    If dash <= 0 Then ParseSeqTail = 0: Exit Function
    Dim tail As String
    tail = Mid(knwNo, dash + 1)
    On Error Resume Next
    ParseSeqTail = CLng(tail)
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then ParseSeqTail = 0: Err.Clear
End Function

Private Function EscJ(ByVal s As String) As String
    Dim t As String: t = s
    t = Replace(t, "\", "\\")
    t = Replace(t, """", "\""")
    t = Replace(t, vbCrLf, " ")
    t = Replace(t, vbCr, " ")
    t = Replace(t, vbLf, " ")
    t = Replace(t, vbTab, " ")
    EscJ = t
End Function

docs.title: modE2E_Search.bas
docs.text: 配置先: 共通モジュール（検索.xlsm / 管理.xlsm 共通） 種類: 標準モジュール 更新日: 2026-06-08 12:53

docs.title: 保存方法
docs.text:
下のコードをメモ帳に貼り付け、[名前を付けて保存] で次のように保存してください。

  • 場所: C:\KnowledgeMgr\installer\vba_modules\common\\
  • ファイル名: modE2E_Search.bas
  • ファイルの種類: すべてのファイル
  • 文字コード: ANSI（Shift-JIS）

メモ帳の文字コードを ANSI にしないと、VBA の日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 UTF-8 で保存すると VBA Import 時に日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 改行コードは CRLF（Windows 標準）のままで OK です。

docs.title: ソースコード
docs.text:
Attribute VB_Name = "modE2E_Search"
' ================================================================
' Module:  modE2E_Search  (REAL, ADR-0092 / ADR-0107 / ADR-0110 compliant)
' Purpose: E2E coverage for search-domain APIs via real production calls.
'   25 cases = 5 categories x 5 sub-variants.
'   categories: free_word / field_search / format_filter /
'               date_range  / sort_order
'   sub: empty_keyword / normal_keyword / jp_keyword /
'        no_match     / boundary_long
' All boolean pass values are computed at runtime from API results.
' No stub / no fixed "pass":true literals. Production API calls only.
' ================================================================
Option Explicit

Private Const PFX As String = "E2ESR_"

Public Function Run_Search_Cases(ByVal role As String) As String
    Dim sb As String, sep As String
    sb = "{""role"":""search-" & role & """,""cases"":["
    sep = ""
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To 25
        sb = sb & sep & RunSr(i, role): sep = ","
    Next i
    sb = sb & "]}"
    Run_Search_Cases = sb
End Function

Public Sub Run_Search_Cases_Out(ByVal outPath As String)
    Dim role As String, s As String, fh As Integer
    role = Replace(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".xlsm", "")
    s = Run_Search_Cases(role)
    fh = FreeFile
    Open outPath For Output As #fh
    Print #fh, s
    Close #fh
End Sub

Private Function RunSr(ByVal n As Long, ByVal role As String) As String
    Dim id As String, fname As String, cat As String, subnm As String
    id = "sr-" & Format(n, "00")
    Dim grp As Long: grp = ((n - 1) Mod 5) + 1
    Select Case grp
        Case 1: cat = "free_word"
        Case 2: cat = "field_search"
        Case 3: cat = "format_filter"
        Case 4: cat = "date_range"
        Case 5: cat = "sort_order"
    End Select
    Dim sb_ As Long: sb_ = ((n - 1) \ 5) + 1
    Select Case sb_
        Case 1: subnm = "empty_keyword"
        Case 2: subnm = "normal_keyword"
        Case 3: subnm = "jp_keyword"
        Case 4: subnm = "no_match"
        Case 5: subnm = "boundary_long"
    End Select
    fname = cat & "_" & subnm

    Dim ok As Boolean, note As String
    ok = Probe(n, cat, subnm, role, note)

    RunSr = "{""case"":" & n & ",""id"":""" & id & _
            """,""name"":""" & fname & _
            """,""pass"":" & LCase(CStr(ok)) & _
            ",""note"":""" & EscJ(note) & """}"
End Function

Private Function EscJ(ByVal s As String) As String
    Dim t As String: t = s
    t = Replace(t, "\", "\\")
    t = Replace(t, """", "\""")
    t = Replace(t, vbCr, " ")
    t = Replace(t, vbLf, " ")
    EscJ = t
End Function

Private Function IsSearchRole() As Boolean
    Dim wb As String
    On Error Resume Next
    wb = ThisWorkbook.Name
    On Error GoTo 0
    ' kensaku == ChrW(&H691C) & ChrW(&H7D22)
    If InStr(wb, ChrW(&H691C) & ChrW(&H7D22)) > 0 Then
        IsSearchRole = True: Exit Function
    End If
    IsSearchRole = (LCase(Replace(wb, ".xlsm", "")) = "search" Or _
                    LCase(Replace(wb, ".xlsm", "")) = "kensaku")
End Function

Private Function IsAdminRole() As Boolean
    Dim wb As String
    On Error Resume Next
    wb = ThisWorkbook.Name
    On Error GoTo 0
    If InStr(wb, ChrW(&H7BA1) & ChrW(&H7406)) > 0 Then
        IsAdminRole = True: Exit Function
    End If
    IsAdminRole = (LCase(Replace(wb, ".xlsm", "")) = "admin" Or _
                   LCase(Replace(wb, ".xlsm", "")) = "kanri")
End Function

Private Function IsRegisterRole() As Boolean
    Dim wb As String
    On Error Resume Next
    wb = ThisWorkbook.Name
    On Error GoTo 0
    ' touroku-shusei = ChrW(&H767B) & ChrW(&H9332) & ChrW(&H4FEE) & ChrW(&H6B63)
    If InStr(wb, ChrW(&H767B) & ChrW(&H9332)) > 0 Then
        IsRegisterRole = True: Exit Function
    End If
    IsRegisterRole = (LCase(Replace(wb, ".xlsm", "")) = "register" Or _
                      LCase(Replace(wb, ".xlsm", "")) = "touroku")
End Function

Private Function BuildKeyword(ByVal subnm As String) As String
    Select Case subnm
        Case "empty_keyword"
            BuildKeyword = ""
        Case "normal_keyword"
            BuildKeyword = "a"
        Case "jp_keyword"
            ' single CJK character (kanji "kan"=ChrW(&H6F22)) for CP932 strict path
            BuildKeyword = ChrW(&H6F22)
        Case "no_match"
            BuildKeyword = "ZZZZZZNOMATCHQQQ"
        Case "boundary_long"
            BuildKeyword = String(200, "x")
        Case Else
            BuildKeyword = ""
    End Select
End Function

Private Function NewEngine(ByRef note As String) As clsSearchEngine
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim e As clsSearchEngine: Set e = New clsSearchEngine
    Dim dataDir As String
    dataDir = modConfigHolder.GetDataDir()
    Dim lg As clsLogger: Set lg = New clsLogger
    e.Init lg, dataDir
    If Err.Number <> 0 Then
        note = note & ",engine_init_err=" & Err.Number
        Err.Clear
    End If
    Set NewEngine = e
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

Private Function PickAnyFormatId() As String
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim lst As Collection
    Set lst = modFormatLoader.LoadFormatList()
    If lst Is Nothing Then PickAnyFormatId = "": Exit Function
    If lst.Count = 0 Then PickAnyFormatId = "": Exit Function
    Dim ent As Object: Set ent = lst.Item(1)
    PickAnyFormatId = CStr(ent("FormatID"))
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

Private Function CountAllKnowledges() As Long
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim c As Collection
    Set c = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListAllKnowledges()
    If c Is Nothing Then CountAllKnowledges = 0: Exit Function
    CountAllKnowledges = c.Count
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

Private Function BuildDict(ByVal keyword As String, _
                            ByVal targetFields As String, _
                            ByVal formatId As String, _
                            ByVal dateFrom As String, _
                            ByVal dateTo As String) As Object
    Dim d As Object: Set d = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    d.Add "keyword", keyword
    d.Add "targetFields", targetFields
    d.Add "formatId", formatId
    d.Add "dateFrom", dateFrom
    d.Add "dateTo", dateTo
    d.Add "category", ""
    d.Add "assignee", ""
    d.Add "directNo", ""
    d.Add "searchMode", "and"
    d.Add "sortKey", ""
    d.Add "sortOrder", "asc"
    Set BuildDict = d
End Function

Private Function Probe(ByVal n As Long, _
                       ByVal cat As String, _
                       ByVal subnm As String, _
                       ByVal role As String, _
                       ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next

    ' Search APIs are read-only and callable from all roles -- run real probes everywhere.

    Select Case cat
        Case "free_word":      Probe = Probe_FreeWord(subnm, note)
        Case "field_search":   Probe = Probe_FieldSearch(subnm, note)
        Case "format_filter":  Probe = Probe_FormatFilter(subnm, note)
        Case "date_range":     Probe = Probe_DateRange(subnm, note)
        Case "sort_order":     Probe = Probe_SortOrder(subnm, note)
        Case Else
            note = "unknown_category"
            Probe = False
    End Select
End Function

Private Function Probe_FreeWord(ByVal subnm As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim kw As String: kw = BuildKeyword(subnm)
    Dim totalKnw As Long: totalKnw = CountAllKnowledges()
    Dim engine As clsSearchEngine: Set engine = NewEngine(note)
    If engine Is Nothing Then
        note = note & ",engine_nothing"
        Probe_FreeWord = False: Exit Function
    End If

    Dim d As Object: Set d = BuildDict(kw, "", "", "", "")
    Dim res As Collection
    Set res = engine.ExecuteSearch(d)
    Dim cnt As Long
    If res Is Nothing Then cnt = -1 Else cnt = res.Count

    note = "free,kw_len=" & Len(kw) & ",total=" & totalKnw & ",got=" & cnt

    Select Case subnm
        Case "empty_keyword"
            ' empty keyword -> production may return all or 0 (config dep);
            ' result Collection must be non-Nothing.
            Probe_FreeWord = (Not res Is Nothing)
        Case "normal_keyword"
            Probe_FreeWord = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt >= 0)
        Case "jp_keyword"
            ' jp keyword via CP932 strict path; must not crash and must return collection
            Probe_FreeWord = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt >= 0)
        Case "no_match"
            Probe_FreeWord = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt = 0)
        Case "boundary_long"
            ' 200-char keyword: production should reject or return 0
            Probe_FreeWord = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt = 0)
        Case Else
            Probe_FreeWord = False
    End Select
End Function

Private Function Probe_FieldSearch(ByVal subnm As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim kw As String: kw = BuildKeyword(subnm)
    Dim engine As clsSearchEngine: Set engine = NewEngine(note)
    If engine Is Nothing Then
        note = note & ",engine_nothing"
        Probe_FieldSearch = False: Exit Function
    End If

    ' targetFields: comma-separated field name list
    Dim flds As String: flds = "Title,Body"
    Dim d As Object: Set d = BuildDict(kw, flds, "", "", "")
    Dim res As Collection: Set res = engine.ExecuteSearch(d)
    Dim cnt As Long
    If res Is Nothing Then cnt = -1 Else cnt = res.Count

    note = "field,fld=" & flds & ",kw_len=" & Len(kw) & ",got=" & cnt

    Select Case subnm
        Case "empty_keyword"
            Probe_FieldSearch = (Not res Is Nothing)
        Case "normal_keyword"
            Probe_FieldSearch = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt >= 0)
        Case "jp_keyword"
            Probe_FieldSearch = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt >= 0)
        Case "no_match"
            Probe_FieldSearch = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt = 0)
        Case "boundary_long"
            Probe_FieldSearch = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt = 0)
        Case Else
            Probe_FieldSearch = False
    End Select
End Function

Private Function Probe_FormatFilter(ByVal subnm As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim kw As String: kw = BuildKeyword(subnm)
    Dim fid As String: fid = PickAnyFormatId()
    Dim engine As clsSearchEngine: Set engine = NewEngine(note)
    If engine Is Nothing Then
        note = note & ",engine_nothing"
        Probe_FormatFilter = False: Exit Function
    End If

    Dim d As Object: Set d = BuildDict(kw, "", fid, "", "")
    Dim res As Collection: Set res = engine.ExecuteSearch(d)
    Dim cnt As Long
    If res Is Nothing Then cnt = -1 Else cnt = res.Count

    ' cross-check via ListKnowledgesByFormat (production API) for upper bound
    Dim listed As Collection: Set listed = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListKnowledgesByFormat(fid)
    Dim listedCnt As Long
    If listed Is Nothing Then listedCnt = 0 Else listedCnt = listed.Count

    note = "fmt,fid=" & fid & ",kw_len=" & Len(kw) & ",got=" & cnt & ",fmt_total=" & listedCnt

    Select Case subnm
        Case "empty_keyword"
            ' format filter + empty kw -> count must be <= fmt_total
            Probe_FormatFilter = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt >= 0) And (cnt <= listedCnt)
        Case "normal_keyword"
            Probe_FormatFilter = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt >= 0) And (cnt <= listedCnt)
        Case "jp_keyword"
            Probe_FormatFilter = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt >= 0) And (cnt <= listedCnt)
        Case "no_match"
            Probe_FormatFilter = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt = 0)
        Case "boundary_long"
            Probe_FormatFilter = (Not res Is Nothing) And (cnt = 0)
        Case Else
            Probe_FormatFilter = False
    End Select
End Function

Private Function Probe_DateRange(ByVal subnm As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim kw As String: kw = BuildKeyword(subnm)
    Dim engine As clsSearchEngine: Set engine = NewEngine(note)
    If engine Is Nothing Then
        note = note & ",engine_nothing"
        Probe_DateRange = False: Exit Function
    End If

    ' wide date range covering production data
    Dim df As String, dt As String
    df = "2000/01/01": dt = "2099/12/31"
    Dim d As Object: Set d = BuildDict(kw, "", "", df, dt)
    Dim resWide As Collection: Set resWide = engine.ExecuteSearch(d)
    Dim cntWide As Long
    If resWide Is Nothing Then cntWide = -1 Else cntWide = resWide.Count

    ' impossible range: future window, expect 0
    Dim d2 As Object: Set d2 = BuildDict(kw, "", "", "2999/01/01", "2999/12/31")
    Dim resNarrow As Collection: Set resNarrow = engine.ExecuteSearch(d2)
    Dim cntNarrow As Long
    If resNarrow Is Nothing Then cntNarrow = -1 Else cntNarrow = resNarrow.Count

    note = "date,kw_len=" & Len(kw) & ",wide=" & cntWide & ",narrow=" & cntNarrow

    Select Case subnm
        Case "empty_keyword"
            Probe_DateRange = (Not resWide Is Nothing) And (Not resNarrow Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntNarrow = 0)
        Case "normal_keyword"
            Probe_DateRange = (Not resWide Is Nothing) And (Not resNarrow Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntNarrow = 0) And (cntWide >= cntNarrow)
        Case "jp_keyword"
            Probe_DateRange = (Not resWide Is Nothing) And (Not resNarrow Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntNarrow = 0)
        Case "no_match"
            Probe_DateRange = (Not resWide Is Nothing) And (Not resNarrow Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntWide = 0) And (cntNarrow = 0)
        Case "boundary_long"
            Probe_DateRange = (Not resWide Is Nothing) And (Not resNarrow Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntWide = 0) And (cntNarrow = 0)
        Case Else
            Probe_DateRange = False
    End Select
End Function

Private Function Probe_SortOrder(ByVal subnm As String, ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim kw As String: kw = BuildKeyword(subnm)
    Dim engine As clsSearchEngine: Set engine = NewEngine(note)
    If engine Is Nothing Then
        note = note & ",engine_nothing"
        Probe_SortOrder = False: Exit Function
    End If

    Dim dAsc As Object: Set dAsc = BuildDict(kw, "", "", "", "")
    dAsc("sortKey") = "knowledgeNo"
    dAsc("sortOrder") = "asc"
    Dim resAsc As Collection: Set resAsc = engine.ExecuteSearch(dAsc)
    Dim cntAsc As Long
    If resAsc Is Nothing Then cntAsc = -1 Else cntAsc = resAsc.Count

    Dim dDesc As Object: Set dDesc = BuildDict(kw, "", "", "", "")
    dDesc("sortKey") = "knowledgeNo"
    dDesc("sortOrder") = "desc"
    Dim resDesc As Collection: Set resDesc = engine.ExecuteSearch(dDesc)
    Dim cntDesc As Long
    If resDesc Is Nothing Then cntDesc = -1 Else cntDesc = resDesc.Count

    note = "sort,kw_len=" & Len(kw) & ",asc=" & cntAsc & ",desc=" & cntDesc

    Select Case subnm
        Case "empty_keyword"
            Probe_SortOrder = (Not resAsc Is Nothing) And (Not resDesc Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntAsc = cntDesc)
        Case "normal_keyword"
            Probe_SortOrder = (Not resAsc Is Nothing) And (Not resDesc Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntAsc = cntDesc) And (cntAsc >= 0)
        Case "jp_keyword"
            Probe_SortOrder = (Not resAsc Is Nothing) And (Not resDesc Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntAsc = cntDesc)
        Case "no_match"
            Probe_SortOrder = (Not resAsc Is Nothing) And (Not resDesc Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntAsc = 0) And (cntDesc = 0)
        Case "boundary_long"
            Probe_SortOrder = (Not resAsc Is Nothing) And (Not resDesc Is Nothing) _
                              And (cntAsc = 0) And (cntDesc = 0)
        Case Else
            Probe_SortOrder = False
    End Select
End Function

docs.title: modE2E_UserForm.bas
docs.text: 配置先: 共通モジュール（検索.xlsm / 管理.xlsm 共通） 種類: 標準モジュール 更新日: 2026-06-08 12:53

docs.title: 保存方法
docs.text:
下のコードをメモ帳に貼り付け、[名前を付けて保存] で次のように保存してください。

  • 場所: C:\KnowledgeMgr\installer\vba_modules\common\\
  • ファイル名: modE2E_UserForm.bas
  • ファイルの種類: すべてのファイル
  • 文字コード: ANSI（Shift-JIS）

メモ帳の文字コードを ANSI にしないと、VBA の日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 UTF-8 で保存すると VBA Import 時に日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 改行コードは CRLF（Windows 標準）のままで OK です。

docs.title: ソースコード
docs.text:
<pre><code>Attribute VB_Name = "modE2E_UserForm"
' ================================================================
' Module:  modE2E_UserForm  (REAL, ADR-0110 compliant)
' Purpose: E2E coverage for UserForm dynamic-build lifecycle.
'          Drives clsUserFormRenderer.ShowFormModeless (production
'          API), simulates input via Controls collection, invokes
'          production button handlers (modUserFormCallback.OnXxx),
'          then verifies via modKnowledgeFileIO / modFormatLoader.
'
' 20 cases:
'   form_type = ((n-1) Mod 4) + 1
'     1 registration   - register-role form, mode="register"
'     2 edit           - register-role form, mode="edit"
'     3 format_edit    - admin-role format editing form
'     4 format_preview - admin-role format preview form
'   scenario  = ((n-1) \ 4) + 1
'     1 launch_only      - Show -> immediate Unload
'     2 enter_save       - set values -> OnRegister/OnUpdate -> verify
'     3 enter_cancel     - set values -> close without save
'     4 jp_input         - ChrW JP values -> save -> reload match
'     5 validation_error - invalid input -> reject path
'
' Role gate:
'   registration / edit  -> register xlsm REAL; admin/search skipped-by-design
'   format_edit / format_preview -> admin xlsm REAL; register/search skipped-by-design
'
' Boolean pass values are computed at runtime from API results.
' UserForm is dispatched ONLY via vbModeless (ShowFormModeless).
' vbModal usage is BANNED here (would block headless Excel COM).
' ================================================================
Option Explicit

Private Const PFX As String = "E2EUF_"

Public Function Run_UserForm_Cases(ByVal role As String) As String
    Dim sb As String, sep As String
    sb = "{""role"":""userform-" & role & """,""cases"":["
    sep = ""
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To 20
        sb = sb & sep & RunUf(i, role): sep = ","
    Next i
    sb = sb & "]}"
    Run_UserForm_Cases = sb
End Function

Public Sub Run_UserForm_Cases_Out(ByVal outPath As String)
    Dim role As String, s As String, fh As Integer
    role = Replace(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".xlsm", "")
    s = Run_UserForm_Cases(role)
    fh = FreeFile
    Open outPath For Output As #fh
    Print #fh, s
    Close #fh
End Sub

Private Function RunUf(ByVal n As Long, ByVal role As String) As String
    Dim id As String, fname As String, ftype As String, scen As String
    id = "uf-" & Format(n, "00")
    Dim grp As Long: grp = ((n - 1) Mod 4) + 1
    Select Case grp
        Case 1: ftype = "registration"
        Case 2: ftype = "edit"
        Case 3: ftype = "format_edit"
        Case 4: ftype = "format_preview"
    End Select
    Dim sb_ As Long: sb_ = ((n - 1) \ 4) + 1
    Select Case sb_
        Case 1: scen = "launch_only"
        Case 2: scen = "enter_save"
        Case 3: scen = "enter_cancel"
        Case 4: scen = "jp_input"
        Case 5: scen = "validation_error"
    End Select
    fname = ftype & "_" & scen

    Dim ok As Boolean, note As String
    ok = Probe(n, ftype, scen, role, note)

    RunUf = "{""case"":" & n & ",""id"":""" & id & _
            """,""name"":""" & fname & _
            """,""pass"":" & LCase(CStr(ok)) & _
            ",""note"":""" & EscJ(note) & """}"
End Function

Private Function EscJ(ByVal s As String) As String
    Dim t As String: t = s
    t = Replace(t, "\", "\\")
    t = Replace(t, """", "\""")
    t = Replace(t, vbCr, " ")
    t = Replace(t, vbLf, " ")
    EscJ = t
End Function

Private Function ExpectedRole(ByVal ftype As String) As String
    Select Case ftype
        Case "registration", "edit"
            ExpectedRole = "register"
        Case "format_edit", "format_preview"
            ExpectedRole = "admin"
        Case Else
            ExpectedRole = ""
    End Select
End Function

Private Function SeedTestFormat(ByVal fid As String, _
                                 ByVal includeMandatory As Boolean) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim sects As Collection: Set sects = New Collection
    Dim head As ClsStanzaSection
    Set head = New ClsStanzaSection
    head.Init "FORMAT", 1
    head.SetValue "FormatID", fid
    head.SetValue "Description", "uf-seed"
    head.SetValue "FormatVersion", "1"
    sects.Add head
    Dim f1 As ClsStanzaSection
    Set f1 = New ClsStanzaSection
    f1.Init "FIELD", 11
    f1.SetValue "Name", "title"
    f1.SetValue "Type", "text"
    If includeMandatory Then f1.SetValue "Required", "true"
    sects.Add f1
    Dim f2 As ClsStanzaSection
    Set f2 = New ClsStanzaSection
    f2.Init "FIELD", 12
    f2.SetValue "Name", "body"
    f2.SetValue "Type", "text"
    sects.Add f2
    Dim rc As Long: rc = modFormatLoader.SaveFormat(fid, sects)
    SeedTestFormat = (rc = 0)
End Function

Private Sub CleanupFmt(ByVal fid As String)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim fso As Object: Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    Dim p As String
    p = modConfigHolder.GetFormatDir() & fid & ".txt"
    If fso.FileExists(p) Then fso.DeleteFile p
End Sub

Private Sub CleanupKnowledge(ByVal kid As String)
    On Error Resume Next
    Call modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge(kid)
End Sub

Private Function FindDynForm() As Object
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim uf As Object
    For Each uf In VBA.UserForms
        If Left(uf.Name, 7) = "frmDyn_" Then
            Set FindDynForm = uf
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next uf
End Function
