Private Sub TrySetCtl(ByVal frm As Object, ByVal nm As String, ByVal v As Variant)
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim c As Object
    Set c = frm.Controls(nm)
    If c Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    c.Value = v
End Sub

Private Function TryGetCtl(ByVal frm As Object, ByVal nm As String) As String
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim c As Object
    Set c = frm.Controls(nm)
    If c Is Nothing Then
        TryGetCtl = ""
        Exit Function
    End If
    TryGetCtl = CStr(c.Value)
End Function

Private Function Probe(ByVal n As Long, _
                       ByVal ftype As String, _
                       ByVal scen As String, _
                       ByVal role As String, _
                       ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next

    Dim wantRole As String: wantRole = ExpectedRole(ftype)
    If LCase(role) <> LCase(wantRole) Then
        note = "skipped-by-design role=" & role & " want=" & wantRole & " ftype=" & ftype
        Probe = True
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim fid As String, kid As String
    fid = PFX & Format(n, "00")
    kid = PFX & "K" & Format(n, "00")

    Select Case ftype
        Case "registration":   Probe = Probe_Registration(n, scen, fid, kid, note)
        Case "edit":           Probe = Probe_Edit(n, scen, fid, kid, note)
        Case "format_edit":    Probe = Probe_FormatEdit(n, scen, fid, note)
        Case "format_preview": Probe = Probe_FormatPreview(n, scen, fid, note)
        Case Else
            note = "unknown_form_type=" & ftype
            Probe = False
    End Select
End Function

Private Function Probe_Registration(ByVal n As Long, ByVal scen As String, _
                                     ByVal fid As String, ByVal kid As String, _
                                     ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    CleanupFmt fid: CleanupKnowledge kid
    Dim seeded As Boolean: seeded = SeedTestFormat(fid, (scen = "validation_error"))
    If Not seeded Then
        note = "reg_seed_fail"
        Probe_Registration = False
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    r.TestSeedFormatId fid
    modUserFormCallback.SetRenderer r

    Dim showRet As String
    showRet = r.ShowFormModeless(ThisWorkbook.Name, "register", "", fid)
    DoEvents
    Dim frm As Object
    Set frm = FindDynForm()

    Select Case scen
        Case "launch_only"
            Dim built As Boolean: built = Not (frm Is Nothing)
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "reg_launch built=" & built & " ret=" & showRet
            Probe_Registration = built And (InStr(showRet, "OK:") = 1)
        Case "enter_save"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "reg_save_no_form ret=" & showRet
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_Registration = False
                Exit Function
            End If
            TrySetCtl frm, "title", "uf_save_" & CStr(n)
            TrySetCtl frm, "body", "uf_body_" & CStr(n)
            DoEvents
            modUserFormCallback.OnRegister
            DoEvents
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim lst As Collection
            Set lst = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListKnowledgesByFormat(fid)
            Dim cnt As Long: cnt = IIf(lst Is Nothing, 0, lst.Count)
            note = "reg_save cnt=" & cnt
            Probe_Registration = (cnt >= 1)
            Dim kk As Variant
            If Not lst Is Nothing Then
                For Each kk In lst
                    modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge CStr(kk)
                Next kk
            End If
        Case "enter_cancel"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "reg_cancel_no_form"
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_Registration = False
                Exit Function
            End If
            TrySetCtl frm, "title", "discarded_" & CStr(n)
            DoEvents
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim lst2 As Collection
            Set lst2 = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListKnowledgesByFormat(fid)
            Dim cnt2 As Long: cnt2 = IIf(lst2 Is Nothing, 0, lst2.Count)
            note = "reg_cancel cnt=" & cnt2
            Probe_Registration = (cnt2 = 0)
        Case "jp_input"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "reg_jp_no_form"
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_Registration = False
                Exit Function
            End If
            Dim jpVal As String
            jpVal = ChrW(&H6F22) & ChrW(&H5B57) & "_" & CStr(n)
            TrySetCtl frm, "title", jpVal
            TrySetCtl frm, "body", jpVal & jpVal
            DoEvents
            modUserFormCallback.OnRegister
            DoEvents
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim lst3 As Collection
            Set lst3 = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListKnowledgesByFormat(fid)
            Dim cnt3 As Long: cnt3 = IIf(lst3 Is Nothing, 0, lst3.Count)
            Dim matched As Boolean: matched = False
            Dim kk3 As Variant
            If cnt3 >= 1 Then
                For Each kk3 In lst3
                    Dim d As Object
                    Set d = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(CStr(kk3))
                    If Not d Is Nothing Then
                        Dim got As String
                        got = ""
                        If d.Exists("title") Then got = CStr(d("title"))
                        If InStr(got, ChrW(&H6F22)) > 0 Then matched = True
                    End If
                    modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge CStr(kk3)
                Next kk3
            End If
            note = "reg_jp cnt=" & cnt3 & " matched=" & matched
            Probe_Registration = matched
        Case "validation_error"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "reg_vld_no_form"
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_Registration = False
                Exit Function
            End If
            TrySetCtl frm, "body", "noTitle_" & CStr(n)
            DoEvents
            modUserFormCallback.OnRegister
            DoEvents
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim lst4 As Collection
            Set lst4 = modKnowledgeFileIO.ListKnowledgesByFormat(fid)
            Dim cnt4 As Long: cnt4 = IIf(lst4 Is Nothing, 0, lst4.Count)
            Dim kk4 As Variant
            If cnt4 > 0 Then
                For Each kk4 In lst4
                    modKnowledgeFileIO.DeleteKnowledge CStr(kk4)
                Next kk4
            End If
            If cnt4 = 0 Then
                note = "reg_vld_reject cnt=" & cnt4
                Probe_Registration = True
            Else
                note = "FAIL_reg_vld_should_reject_but_accepted cnt=" & cnt4
                Probe_Registration = False
            End If
        Case Else
            note = "reg_unknown_scen=" & scen
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Probe_Registration = False
    End Select

    CleanupFmt fid
End Function

Private Function Probe_Edit(ByVal n As Long, ByVal scen As String, _
                             ByVal fid As String, ByVal kid As String, _
                             ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    CleanupFmt fid: CleanupKnowledge kid
    If Not SeedTestFormat(fid, False) Then
        note = "edit_seed_fmt_fail"
        Probe_Edit = False
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim dataIn As Object
    Set dataIn = CreateObject("Scripting.Dictionary")
    dataIn("title") = "edit_seed_" & CStr(n)
    dataIn("body") = "edit_body_" & CStr(n)
    Dim createdKid As String
    createdKid = modKnowledgeFileIO.SaveKnowledge("", fid, dataIn)
    If LenB(createdKid) = 0 Then
        note = "edit_seed_knowledge_fail"
        Probe_Edit = False
        CleanupFmt fid
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    r.TestSeedFormatId fid
    modUserFormCallback.SetRenderer r

    Dim showRet As String
    showRet = r.ShowFormModeless(ThisWorkbook.Name, "edit", createdKid, fid)
    DoEvents
    Dim frm As Object
    Set frm = FindDynForm()

    Select Case scen
        Case "launch_only"
            Dim built As Boolean: built = Not (frm Is Nothing)
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "edit_launch built=" & built & " ret=" & showRet & " kid=" & createdKid
            Probe_Edit = built And (InStr(showRet, "OK:") = 1)
        Case "enter_save"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "edit_save_no_form"
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_Edit = False
                CleanupKnowledge createdKid
                CleanupFmt fid
                Exit Function
            End If
            TrySetCtl frm, "title", "edit_after_" & CStr(n)
            DoEvents
            modUserFormCallback.OnUpdate
            DoEvents
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim reload As Object
            Set reload = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(createdKid)
            Dim newTitle As String
            If Not reload Is Nothing Then
                If reload.Exists("title") Then newTitle = CStr(reload("title"))
            End If
            note = "edit_save title=" & newTitle
            Probe_Edit = (InStr(newTitle, "edit_after_") > 0)
        Case "enter_cancel"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "edit_cancel_no_form"
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_Edit = False
                CleanupKnowledge createdKid
                CleanupFmt fid
                Exit Function
            End If
            TrySetCtl frm, "title", "discarded_edit_" & CStr(n)
            DoEvents
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim reload2 As Object
            Set reload2 = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(createdKid)
            Dim untouched As String
            If Not reload2 Is Nothing Then
                If reload2.Exists("title") Then untouched = CStr(reload2("title"))
            End If
            note = "edit_cancel title=" & untouched
            Probe_Edit = (InStr(untouched, "edit_seed_") > 0)
        Case "jp_input"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "edit_jp_no_form"
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_Edit = False
                CleanupKnowledge createdKid
                CleanupFmt fid
                Exit Function
            End If
            Dim jpVal As String
            jpVal = ChrW(&H5909) & ChrW(&H66F4) & "_" & CStr(n)
            TrySetCtl frm, "title", jpVal
            DoEvents
            modUserFormCallback.OnUpdate
            DoEvents
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim reload3 As Object
            Set reload3 = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(createdKid)
            Dim got As String
            If Not reload3 Is Nothing Then
                If reload3.Exists("title") Then got = CStr(reload3("title"))
            End If
            note = "edit_jp got=" & got
            Probe_Edit = (InStr(got, ChrW(&H5909)) > 0)
        Case "validation_error"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "edit_vld_no_form"
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_Edit = False
                CleanupKnowledge createdKid
                CleanupFmt fid
                Exit Function
            End If
            TrySetCtl frm, "title", ""
            DoEvents
            modUserFormCallback.OnUpdate
            DoEvents
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim reload4 As Object
            Set reload4 = modKnowledgeFileIO.LoadKnowledge(createdKid)
            Dim titleAfter As String
            titleAfter = ""
            If Not reload4 Is Nothing Then
                If reload4.Exists("title") Then titleAfter = CStr(reload4("title"))
            End If
            If InStr(titleAfter, "edit_seed_") > 0 Then
                note = "edit_vld_reject title=" & titleAfter
                Probe_Edit = True
            Else
                note = "FAIL_edit_vld_should_reject_but_accepted title=" & titleAfter
                Probe_Edit = False
            End If
        Case Else
            note = "edit_unknown_scen=" & scen
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Probe_Edit = False
    End Select

    CleanupKnowledge createdKid
    CleanupFmt fid
End Function

Private Function Probe_FormatEdit(ByVal n As Long, ByVal scen As String, _
                                   ByVal fid As String, _
                                   ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    CleanupFmt fid
    If Not SeedTestFormat(fid, False) Then
        note = "fmtE_seed_fail"
        Probe_FormatEdit = False
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    r.TestSeedFormatId fid
    modUserFormCallback.SetRenderer r

    Dim showRet As String
    showRet = r.ShowFormModeless(ThisWorkbook.Name, "edit", "", fid)
    DoEvents
    Dim frm As Object
    Set frm = FindDynForm()
    Dim built As Boolean: built = Not (frm Is Nothing)

    Select Case scen
        Case "launch_only"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "fmtE_launch built=" & built & " ret=" & showRet
            Probe_FormatEdit = built And (InStr(showRet, "OK:") = 1)
        Case "enter_save"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim base As Collection
            Set base = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(fid)
            If base Is Nothing Then
                note = "fmtE_save_load_fail"
                Probe_FormatEdit = False
                CleanupFmt fid
                Exit Function
            End If
            Dim sec As ClsStanzaSection
            Dim i As Long
            For i = 1 To base.Count
                Set sec = base.Item(i)
                If sec.SectionName = "FORMAT" Then
                    sec.SetValue "Description", "fmtE_save_" & CStr(n)
                    Exit For
                End If
            Next i
            Dim rc As Long: rc = modFormatLoader.SaveFormat(fid, base)
            Dim reload As Collection
            Set reload = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(fid)
            Dim got As String
            If Not reload Is Nothing Then
                Dim sec2 As ClsStanzaSection
                For i = 1 To reload.Count
                    Set sec2 = reload.Item(i)
                    If sec2.SectionName = "FORMAT" Then
                        got = sec2.GetValue("Description")
                        Exit For
                    End If
                Next i
            End If
            note = "fmtE_save rc=" & rc & " got=" & got
            Probe_FormatEdit = (rc = 0) And (InStr(got, "fmtE_save_") > 0)
        Case "enter_cancel"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim reload2 As Collection
            Set reload2 = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(fid)
            Dim origDesc As String
            If Not reload2 Is Nothing Then
                Dim sec3 As ClsStanzaSection
                Dim j As Long
                For j = 1 To reload2.Count
                    Set sec3 = reload2.Item(j)
                    If sec3.SectionName = "FORMAT" Then
                        origDesc = sec3.GetValue("Description")
                        Exit For
                    End If
                Next j
            End If
            note = "fmtE_cancel built=" & built & " desc=" & origDesc
            Probe_FormatEdit = (origDesc = "uf-seed")
        Case "jp_input"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim base2 As Collection
            Set base2 = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(fid)
            If base2 Is Nothing Then
                note = "fmtE_jp_load_fail"
                Probe_FormatEdit = False
                CleanupFmt fid
                Exit Function
            End If
            Dim jpV As String
            jpV = ChrW(&H66F8) & ChrW(&H5F0F) & "_" & CStr(n)
            Dim sec4 As ClsStanzaSection
            Dim k As Long
            For k = 1 To base2.Count
                Set sec4 = base2.Item(k)
                If sec4.SectionName = "FORMAT" Then
                    sec4.SetValue "Description", jpV
                    Exit For
                End If
            Next k
            Dim rc2 As Long: rc2 = modFormatLoader.SaveFormat(fid, base2)
            Dim reload3 As Collection
            Set reload3 = modFormatLoader.LoadFormat(fid)
            Dim gotJ As String
            If Not reload3 Is Nothing Then
                Dim sec5 As ClsStanzaSection
                For k = 1 To reload3.Count
                    Set sec5 = reload3.Item(k)
                    If sec5.SectionName = "FORMAT" Then
                        gotJ = sec5.GetValue("Description")
                        Exit For
                    End If
                Next k
            End If
            note = "fmtE_jp rc=" & rc2 & " got=" & gotJ
            Probe_FormatEdit = (rc2 = 0) And (InStr(gotJ, ChrW(&H66F8)) > 0)
        Case "validation_error"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim bad As Collection
            Set bad = New Collection
            Dim h As ClsStanzaSection
            Set h = New ClsStanzaSection
            h.Init "FORMAT", 1
            h.SetValue "FormatID", ""
            h.SetValue "Description", "should_reject"
            bad.Add h
            Dim rcBad As Long: rcBad = modFormatLoader.SaveFormat("", bad)
            If rcBad <> 0 Then
                note = "fmtE_vld_reject rcBad=" & rcBad
                Probe_FormatEdit = True
            Else
                note = "FAIL_fmtE_vld_should_reject_but_accepted rcBad=" & rcBad
                Probe_FormatEdit = False
            End If
        Case Else
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "fmtE_unknown_scen=" & scen
            Probe_FormatEdit = False
    End Select

    CleanupFmt fid
End Function

Private Function Probe_FormatPreview(ByVal n As Long, ByVal scen As String, _
                                      ByVal fid As String, _
                                      ByRef note As String) As Boolean
    On Error Resume Next
    CleanupFmt fid
    If Not SeedTestFormat(fid, False) Then
        note = "fmtP_seed_fail"
        Probe_FormatPreview = False
        Exit Function
    End If

    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    r.TestSeedFormatId fid

    Dim showRet As String
    showRet = r.ShowFormModeless(ThisWorkbook.Name, "register", "", fid)
    DoEvents
    Dim frm As Object
    Set frm = FindDynForm()
    Dim built As Boolean: built = Not (frm Is Nothing)
    Dim dynName As String: dynName = r.GetDynFormName()
    Dim ctrlCnt As Long
    If built Then ctrlCnt = frm.Controls.Count

    Select Case scen
        Case "launch_only"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "fmtP_launch built=" & built & " ret=" & showRet & " name=" & dynName
            Probe_FormatPreview = built And (Len(dynName) > 0)
        Case "enter_save"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "fmtP_save_noop built=" & built & " ctrls=" & ctrlCnt
            Probe_FormatPreview = built And (ctrlCnt > 0)
        Case "enter_cancel"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "fmtP_cancel built=" & built & " ctrls=" & ctrlCnt
            Probe_FormatPreview = built
        Case "jp_input"
            If frm Is Nothing Then
                note = "fmtP_jp_no_form"
                r.CloseModelessForm
                Probe_FormatPreview = False
                CleanupFmt fid
                Exit Function
            End If
            Dim jpVal As String
            jpVal = ChrW(&H8868) & ChrW(&H793A) & "_" & CStr(n)
            TrySetCtl frm, "title", jpVal
            DoEvents
            Dim back As String: back = TryGetCtl(frm, "title")
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "fmtP_jp set=" & jpVal & " back=" & back
            Probe_FormatPreview = (InStr(back, ChrW(&H8868)) > 0)
        Case "validation_error"
            r.CloseModelessForm
            Dim r2 As clsUserFormRenderer
            Set r2 = New clsUserFormRenderer
            r2.TestSeedFormatId "UF_NOEXIST_" & CStr(n)
            Dim ret2 As String
            ret2 = r2.ShowFormModeless(ThisWorkbook.Name, "register", "", "UF_NOEXIST_" & CStr(n))
            DoEvents
            r2.CloseModelessForm
            If InStr(ret2, "OK:") <> 1 Then
                note = "fmtP_vld_reject ret=" & ret2
                Probe_FormatPreview = True
            Else
                note = "FAIL_fmtP_vld_should_reject_but_accepted ret=" & ret2
                Probe_FormatPreview = False
            End If
        Case Else
            r.CloseModelessForm
            note = "fmtP_unknown_scen=" & scen
            Probe_FormatPreview = False
    End Select

    CleanupFmt fid
End Function
</code></pre>

docs.title: modEntryUserForm.bas
docs.text: 配置先: 共通モジュール（検索.xlsm / 管理.xlsm 共通） 種類: 標準モジュール 更新日: 2026-06-23 08:48 JST

docs.title: 保存方法
docs.text:
下のコードをメモ帳に貼り付け、[名前を付けて保存] で次のように保存してください。

  • 場所: C:\KnowledgeMgr\installer\vba_modules\common\\
  • ファイル名: modEntryUserForm.bas
  • ファイルの種類: すべてのファイル
  • 文字コード: ANSI（Shift-JIS）

メモ帳の文字コードを ANSI にしないと、VBA の日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 UTF-8 で保存すると VBA Import 時に日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 改行コードは CRLF（Windows 標準）のままで OK です。

docs.title: ソースコード
docs.text:
<pre><code>Attribute VB_Name = "modEntryUserForm"
' ================================================================
' modEntryUserForm (v2.3 Phase N-4, 2026-05-27)
' Purpose:
'   v2.3 UserForm entry points for M-05 (register) / M-06 (edit) /
'   M-09 (view). These wrappers instantiate clsUserFormRenderer and
'   call ShowForm with the appropriate mode. The return value is
'   handled (logged + chained when ShowForm returns "EDIT:<id>" or
'   "DELETED").
' Naming follows screen_design_v2.md  2.4 / 2.5 / 2.10:
'   Btn_OpenRegisterForm  -> M-05 (xlsm = touroku)
'   Btn_OpenEditForm      -> M-06 (xlsm = touroku)
'   Btn_OpenViewForm      -> M-09 (xlsm = kensaku)
' Configured for headless friendly behavior: when modCommon.IsHeadless
' is true, ShowForm calls UserForm.Show vbModal which can hang, so the
' wrappers honor a "test-mode" path via TestBuildOnly that exits before
' Show (used by Phase N-5 E2E).
' ================================================================
Option Explicit

' Phase R-1-j: screenshot harness ? module-level renderer instance survives
' the ShowFormModeless call so the form stays visible until HideForm.
Private g_modelessRenderer As clsUserFormRenderer

' xlsm names via ChrW so the .bas survives CP932/UTF-8 round trips
Private Function NM_KANRI() As String:    NM_KANRI = ChrW(&H7BA1) & ChrW(&H7406): End Function
If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1106] modEntryUserForm.NM_KANRI ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
Private Function NM_TOUROKU() As String:  NM_TOUROKU = ChrW(&H767B) & ChrW(&H9332) & ChrW(&H4FEE) & ChrW(&H6B63): End Function
Private Function NM_KENSAKU() As String:  NM_KENSAKU = ChrW(&H691C) & ChrW(&H7D22): End Function

' ================================================================
' Public Sub: Btn_OpenRegisterForm
' Wired to M-05 BTN-OPENFORM. Opens a register UserForm and writes a
' new knowledge file when the user confirms. The knowledge id is
' generated by modUserFormCallback.GenerateKnowledgeId.
' ================================================================
Public Sub Btn_OpenRegisterForm()
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    ' [BTN-GUARD-PRELUDE-BEGIN] auto-injected by inject_btn_template.py
    Const BTN As String = "Btn_OpenRegisterForm"
    Dim XLSM As String
    XLSM = Replace$(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".xlsm", "")
    modBtnGuard.LogEnter BTN, XLSM
    If Not modBtnGuard.CheckPrereq(BTN, "config", XLSM) Then
        modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, False
        If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1107] modEntryUserForm.NM_KANRI EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
        Exit Sub
    End If
    ' [BTN-GUARD-PRELUDE-END]
    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    Dim ret As String
    ret = r.ShowForm(NM_KENSAKU(), "register", "")
    LogShowFormResult "Btn_OpenRegisterForm", ret
    ' [BTN-GUARD-EXIT-OK] auto-injected
    modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, True
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1108] modEntryUserForm.NM_KANRI EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1109] modEntryUserForm.NM_KANRI EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    ' [BTN-GUARD-ERR-LOG] auto-injected
    modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, False
    Debug.Print "[ERR] Btn_OpenRegisterForm: " & Err.Number & " " & Err.Description
End Sub

' ================================================================
' Public Sub: Btn_OpenEditForm
' Wired to M-06 (after Btn_LoadKnowledge fills the knowledgeId cell).
' Reads knowledgeId from B3 of the active sheet and opens an edit form.
' On "DELETED" the workbook callbacks are responsible for the destroy
' notification.
' ================================================================
Public Sub Btn_OpenEditForm()
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1110] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenEditForm ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    ' [BTN-GUARD-PRELUDE-BEGIN] auto-injected by inject_btn_template.py
    Const BTN As String = "Btn_OpenEditForm"
    Dim XLSM As String
    XLSM = Replace$(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".xlsm", "")
    modBtnGuard.LogEnter BTN, XLSM
    If Not modBtnGuard.CheckPrereq(BTN, "config", XLSM) Then
        modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, False
        If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1111] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenEditForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
        Exit Sub
    End If
    ' [BTN-GUARD-PRELUDE-END]
    Dim kid As String
    kid = ReadKnowledgeIdFromActiveSheet()
    If Len(kid) = 0 Then
        Debug.Print "[INFO] Btn_OpenEditForm: knowledgeId blank"
        If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1112] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenEditForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
        Exit Sub
    End If
    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    Dim ret As String
    ret = r.ShowForm(NM_TOUROKU(), "edit", kid, True)
    LogShowFormResult "Btn_OpenEditForm", ret
    ' [BTN-GUARD-EXIT-OK] auto-injected
    modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, True
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1113] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenEditForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1114] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenEditForm EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    ' [BTN-GUARD-ERR-LOG] auto-injected
    modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, False
    Debug.Print "[ERR] Btn_OpenEditForm: " & Err.Number & " " & Err.Description
End Sub

' ================================================================
' Public Sub: Btn_OpenViewForm
' Wired to M-09 ?i???b?W?\??. Reads knowledgeId from cell B3 (or the
' M-08 search-result selection) and opens a view form. If the user
' clicks the ??W button the form returns "EDIT:<id>" and we chain
' immediately into Btn_OpenEditForm for that id.
' ================================================================
Public Sub Btn_OpenViewForm()
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1115] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenViewForm ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    ' [BTN-GUARD-PRELUDE-BEGIN] auto-injected by inject_btn_template.py
    Const BTN As String = "Btn_OpenViewForm"
    Dim XLSM As String
    XLSM = Replace$(ThisWorkbook.Name, ".xlsm", "")
    modBtnGuard.LogEnter BTN, XLSM
    If Not modBtnGuard.CheckPrereq(BTN, "config", XLSM) Then
        modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, False
        If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1116] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenViewForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
        Exit Sub
    End If
    ' [BTN-GUARD-PRELUDE-END]
    Dim kid As String
    kid = ReadKnowledgeIdFromActiveSheet()
    If Len(kid) = 0 Then
        Debug.Print "[INFO] Btn_OpenViewForm: knowledgeId blank"
        If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1117] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenViewForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
        Exit Sub
    End If
    OpenViewWithId kid
    ' [BTN-GUARD-EXIT-OK] auto-injected
    modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, True
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1118] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenViewForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1119] modEntryUserForm.Btn_OpenViewForm EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    ' [BTN-GUARD-ERR-LOG] auto-injected
    modBtnGuard.LogExit BTN, XLSM, False
    Debug.Print "[ERR] Btn_OpenViewForm: " & Err.Number & " " & Err.Description
End Sub

' ================================================================
' Public Sub: OpenViewWithId
' Programmatic entry (used by M-08 search-result double click).
' Opens M-09 view form for a given knowledgeId. If the form returns
' "EDIT:<id>" we chain into edit; "DELETED" is logged.
' ================================================================
Public Sub OpenViewWithId(ByVal knowledgeId As String)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1120] modEntryUserForm.OpenViewWithId ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    Dim ret As String
    ret = r.ShowForm(NM_KENSAKU(), "view", knowledgeId, True)
    LogShowFormResult "OpenViewWithId", ret
    ' Chain to edit if requested from view
    If Left(ret, 5) = "EDIT:" Then
        Dim editId As String
        editId = Mid(ret, 6)
        Dim r2 As clsUserFormRenderer
        Set r2 = New clsUserFormRenderer
        Dim ret2 As String
        ret2 = r2.ShowForm(NM_TOUROKU(), "edit", editId, True)
        LogShowFormResult "OpenViewWithId.editChain", ret2
    End If
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1121] modEntryUserForm.OpenViewWithId EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1122] modEntryUserForm.OpenViewWithId EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    Debug.Print "[ERR] OpenViewWithId: " & Err.Number & " " & Err.Description
End Sub

' ================================================================
' Public Function: TestBuildOnly_ShowForm
' Phase N-5 E2E helper. Performs the same logic as ShowForm but
' skips the actual vbModal Show + dispose so a headless test runner
' can verify the build-form path and the persist-and-return path
' deterministically. Returns the candidate knowledgeId that WOULD
' be generated for register mode (or the loaded id for edit/view).
' ================================================================
Public Function TestBuildOnly_ShowForm( _
        ByVal mode As String, _
        ByVal knowledgeId As String, _
        ByVal formatId As String, _
        ByVal fieldsDict As Object _
) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1123] modEntryUserForm.TestBuildOnly_ShowForm ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    ' Persist directly via modUserFormCallback's internal helper logic.
    ' We bypass the actual modal show and exercise the file I/O round
    ' trip that the OnRegister / OnUpdate handlers would normally do.
    Dim sb As String
    Dim id As String
    Select Case LCase(mode)
        Case "register"
            id = modUserFormCallback.TestGenerateKnowledgeId(formatId)
        Case "edit"
            id = knowledgeId
        Case Else
            id = knowledgeId
    End Select

    sb = "###KnowledgeNo###" & vbCrLf & id & vbCrLf
    sb = sb & "###FormatID###" & vbCrLf & formatId & vbCrLf

    Dim k As Variant
    For Each k In fieldsDict.Keys
        sb = sb & "###" & CStr(k) & "###" & vbCrLf & CStr(fieldsDict(CStr(k))) & vbCrLf
    Next k

    Dim filePath As String
    filePath = modKnowledgeFileIO.DataFilePathForSave(id, formatId)
    Dim adoStream As Object
    Set adoStream = CreateObject("ADODB.Stream")
    adoStream.Type = 2
    adoStream.Charset = "Shift_JIS"
    adoStream.Open
    adoStream.WriteText sb
    adoStream.SaveToFile filePath, 2
    adoStream.Close

    TestBuildOnly_ShowForm = id
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1124] modEntryUserForm.TestBuildOnly_ShowForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Function
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1125] modEntryUserForm.TestBuildOnly_ShowForm EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    Debug.Print "[ERR] TestBuildOnly_ShowForm: " & Err.Number & " " & Err.Description
    TestBuildOnly_ShowForm = ""
End Function

' ================================================================
' Phase P E2E test entry points (2026-05-27, hardcoded PFMT format)
' These allow human-driven verification of the dynamic UserForm without
' needing the M-05 sheet to be fully wired (the v2.3 sheet stanza for
' M-05 has no [INPUT] inpFormat dropdown yet). Each entry shows the
' form modally with PFMT as the format and an optional knowledgeId.
' ================================================================
Public Sub TestPhaseP_ShowRegister()
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1126] modEntryUserForm.TestPhaseP_ShowRegister ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Dim ret As String
    ret = TestShowFormWithFmt(NM_TOUROKU(), "register", "", "PFMT")
    LogShowFormResult "TestPhaseP_ShowRegister", ret
End Sub

Public Sub TestPhaseP_ShowEdit()
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1127] modEntryUserForm.TestPhaseP_ShowEdit ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Dim ret As String
    ret = TestShowFormWithFmt(NM_TOUROKU(), "edit", "PFMT-2026-0001", "PFMT")
    LogShowFormResult "TestPhaseP_ShowEdit", ret
End Sub

Public Sub TestPhaseP_ShowView()
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1128] modEntryUserForm.TestPhaseP_ShowView ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Dim ret As String
    ret = TestShowFormWithFmt(NM_KENSAKU(), "view", "PFMT-2026-0001", "PFMT")
    LogShowFormResult "TestPhaseP_ShowView", ret
End Sub

' Internal helper that lets the test entry pin a specific formatId. Reuses
' the production ShowForm dispatch path; only the seed formatId differs.
Private Function TestShowFormWithFmt( _
        ByVal xlsmName As String, _
        ByVal mode As String, _
        ByVal knowledgeId As String, _
        ByVal formatId As String _
) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1129] modEntryUserForm.TestShowFormWithFmt ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    ' Workaround: ShowForm normally resolves formatId from the loaded
    ' knowledge file. For register mode we need to seed it externally.
    ' Use the Public Property GetFormatId style; but the renderer keeps
    ' m_formatId private. Easiest: write a wrapper that calls the same
    ' BuildAndShow flow via a public stub on the renderer if available;
    ' otherwise fall back to ShowForm() (which resolves from the file
    ' when knowledgeId is given - works for edit/view but not register).
    r.TestSeedFormatId formatId
    TestShowFormWithFmt = r.ShowForm(xlsmName, mode, knowledgeId)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1130] modEntryUserForm.TestShowFormWithFmt EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
End Function

' Phase R-1-i: COM-callable measurement harness. PowerShell test script invokes
' this via Application.Run "TestR1_MeasureForm" args and reads the return string.
Public Function TestR1_MeasureForm(ByVal xlsmName As String, ByVal mode As String, _
                                    ByVal knowledgeId As String, ByVal formatId As String) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1131] modEntryUserForm.TestR1_MeasureForm ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    TestR1_MeasureForm = r.MeasureFormConfig(xlsmName, mode, knowledgeId, formatId)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1132] modEntryUserForm.TestR1_MeasureForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Function
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1133] modEntryUserForm.TestR1_MeasureForm EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    TestR1_MeasureForm = "ERR:" & Err.Number & ":" & Err.Description
End Function

' Phase R-1-j: COM-callable path-verify harness. Builds the form like ShowForm
' but skips Show; dumps designer.Controls + resolved m_* + fmtFields to dumpPath.
Public Function TestR1j_DumpForm(ByVal xlsmName As String, ByVal mode As String, _
                                  ByVal knowledgeId As String, ByVal formatId As String, _
                                  ByVal dumpPath As String) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1134] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_DumpForm ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    r.TestSeedFormatId formatId
    TestR1j_DumpForm = r.TestR1j_DumpForm(xlsmName, mode, knowledgeId, formatId, dumpPath)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1135] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_DumpForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Function
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1136] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_DumpForm EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    TestR1j_DumpForm = "ERR:" & Err.Number & ":" & Err.Description
End Function

Public Function TestR1j_ShowFormModeless(ByVal xlsmName As String, ByVal mode As String, _
                                          ByVal knowledgeId As String, ByVal formatId As String) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1137] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_ShowFormModeless ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Set g_modelessRenderer = New clsUserFormRenderer
    g_modelessRenderer.TestSeedFormatId formatId
    TestR1j_ShowFormModeless = g_modelessRenderer.ShowFormModeless(xlsmName, mode, knowledgeId, formatId)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1138] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_ShowFormModeless EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Function
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1139] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_ShowFormModeless EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    TestR1j_ShowFormModeless = "ERR:" & Err.Number & ":" & Err.Description
End Function

Public Function TestR1j_HideForm() As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1140] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_HideForm ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    If Not g_modelessRenderer Is Nothing Then
        g_modelessRenderer.CloseModelessForm
        Set g_modelessRenderer = Nothing
    End If
    TestR1j_HideForm = "OK"
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1141] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_HideForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Function
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1142] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_HideForm EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    TestR1j_HideForm = "ERR:" & Err.Number & ":" & Err.Description
End Function

' Phase R-1-j: modal show with explicit formatId ? blocks until the form is
' closed (so the screenshot harness can launch this in a child process and
' capture the live window). Lets us screenshot any format, not just PFMT.
Public Sub TestR1j_ShowModalWithFmt(ByVal xlsmName As String, ByVal mode As String, _
                                     ByVal knowledgeId As String, ByVal formatId As String)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1143] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_ShowModalWithFmt ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo ErrHandler
    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    r.TestSeedFormatId formatId
    r.ShowForm xlsmName, mode, knowledgeId
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1144] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_ShowModalWithFmt EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Sub
ErrHandler:
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_ERROR Then Debug.Print "[D-1145] modEntryUserForm.TestR1j_ShowModalWithFmt EXIT-ERR " & "errNum=" & Err.Number & " desc=" & Err.Description  ' [ADR-0100]
    Debug.Print "[ERR] TestR1j_ShowModalWithFmt: " & Err.Number & " " & Err.Description
End Sub

' ================================================================
' Phase R-3-gamma-2 E2E (case a): 実 persistence path を Unicode 安全に駆動する
' COM 呼び出し helper。computer-use の日本語 type 文字化けを回避するため、
' field 値は UTF-8 ファイル(ctlname=value 行、改行は \n エスケープ)から設定する。
' 実 modeless form を build/show -> 値設定 -> 実 OnRegister/OnUpdate/OnDelete -> dispose。
'   xlsmName: 役割名 / mode: register|edit / knowledgeId / formatId
'   action  : register|update|delete / valuesFile: UTF-8 値ファイル(空可)
' ================================================================
Public Function TestE2E_DriveForm(ByVal xlsmName As String, ByVal mode As String, _
        ByVal knowledgeId As String, ByVal formatId As String, _
        ByVal action As String, ByVal valuesFile As String) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1146] modEntryUserForm.TestE2E_DriveForm ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo EH
    Dim r As clsUserFormRenderer
    Set r = New clsUserFormRenderer
    r.TestSeedFormatId formatId
    modUserFormCallback.SetRenderer r
    Dim res As String
    res = r.ShowFormModeless(xlsmName, mode, knowledgeId, formatId)
    Dim frm As Object, uf As Object
    For Each uf In VBA.UserForms
        If Left(uf.Name, 7) = "frmDyn_" Then Set frm = uf
    Next uf
    If frm Is Nothing Then
        TestE2E_DriveForm = "ERR:no_form res=" & res
        If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1147] modEntryUserForm.TestE2E_DriveForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
        Exit Function
    End If
    If Len(valuesFile) > 0 Then E2E_ApplyValues frm, valuesFile
    Select Case LCase(action)
        Case "register": modUserFormCallback.OnRegister
        Case "update":   modUserFormCallback.OnUpdate
        Case "delete":   modUserFormCallback.OnDelete
        Case Else        ' "none" = 値設定/保存せず(表示確認のみ)
    End Select
    r.CloseModelessForm
    TestE2E_DriveForm = "OK:" & res
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1148] modEntryUserForm.TestE2E_DriveForm EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Function
EH:
    TestE2E_DriveForm = "ERR:" & Err.Number & ":" & Err.Description
End Function

Private Sub E2E_ApplyValues(ByVal frm As Object, ByVal valuesFile As String)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1149] modEntryUserForm.E2E_ApplyValues ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim st As Object
    Set st = CreateObject("ADODB.Stream")
    st.Type = 2: st.Charset = "UTF-8": st.Open
    st.LoadFromFile valuesFile
    Dim all As String
    all = st.ReadText
    st.Close
    all = Replace(all, vbCrLf, vbLf)
    all = Replace(all, vbCr, vbLf)
    Dim lines() As String, i As Long
    lines = Split(all, vbLf)
    For i = LBound(lines) To UBound(lines)
        Dim ln As String
        ln = lines(i)
        Dim eq As Long
        eq = InStr(ln, "=")
        If eq > 1 Then
            Dim cn As String, vv As String
            cn = Left(ln, eq - 1)
            vv = Mid(ln, eq + 1)
            vv = Replace(vv, "\n", vbCrLf)   ' unescape newline marker
            Dim ctl As Object
            Set ctl = E2E_FindCtl(frm, cn)
            If Not ctl Is Nothing Then
                If TypeName(ctl) = "ComboBox" Then
                    ctl.value = vv
                Else
                    ctl.Text = vv
                End If
                ctl.Tag = ""   ' clear placeholder tag so value is not treated as empty
            End If
        End If
    Next i
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1150] modEntryUserForm.E2E_ApplyValues EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
End Sub

Private Function E2E_FindCtl(ByVal frm As Object, ByVal nm As String) As Object
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1151] modEntryUserForm.E2E_FindCtl ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim c As Object
    Set c = frm.Controls(nm)
    If Not c Is Nothing Then
        Set E2E_FindCtl = c
        If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1152] modEntryUserForm.E2E_FindCtl EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim f As Object
    For Each f In frm.Controls
        If TypeName(f) = "Frame" Then
            Dim cc As Object
            Set cc = Nothing
            Set cc = f.Controls(nm)
            If Not cc Is Nothing Then
                Set E2E_FindCtl = cc
                If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1153] modEntryUserForm.E2E_FindCtl EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
                Exit Function
            End If
        End If
    Next f
End Function

' Phase R-2-Fix diagnostic: full dispatcher trace.
Public Function TestR2_DiagApply(ByVal xlsmName As String, ByVal screenId As String) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1154] modEntryUserForm.TestR2_DiagApply ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Dim sb As String
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim shtName As String
    ' Map screenId -> display name
    Select Case screenId
        Case "M-02": shtName = ChrW(&H30D5) & ChrW(&H30A9) & ChrW(&H30FC) & ChrW(&H30DE) & ChrW(&H30C3) & ChrW(&H30C8) & ChrW(&H4E00) & ChrW(&H89A7)
        Case Else: shtName = screenId
    End Select
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(shtName)
    If ws Is Nothing Then Set ws = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(screenId)
    On Error GoTo 0
    If ws Is Nothing Then TestR2_DiagApply = "ws nothing for " & shtName & "/" & screenId: Exit Function
    sb = "ws=" & ws.Name & vbCrLf
    Dim ok As Boolean
    ok = modUILoader.ApplyUiToSheet(xlsmName, screenId, ws)
    sb = sb & "ApplyUiToSheet=" & ok & vbCrLf
    ' diagnostic only - raw cell probes, not SSOT-driven (ADR-0090 exception #1)
    sb = sb & "A1=[" & CStr(ws.Range("A1").Value) & "]" & vbCrLf
    sb = sb & "Z1=[" & CStr(ws.Range("Z1").Value) & "]" & vbCrLf
    sb = sb & "Z2=[" & CStr(ws.Range("Z2").Value) & "]" & vbCrLf
    TestR2_DiagApply = sb
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1155] modEntryUserForm.TestR2_DiagApply EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
End Function

' Phase R-2-Fix diagnostic: write to log file what ApplyUiToSheet does, step by step.
Public Function TestR2_Diagnose(ByVal xlsmName As String, ByVal screenId As String) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1156] modEntryUserForm.TestR2_Diagnose ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Dim sb As String
    Dim filePath As String
    filePath = modConfigHolder.GetUiDir() & xlsmName & "\" & screenId & ".txt"
    sb = "filePath=" & filePath & vbCrLf
    Dim fso As Object
    Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    sb = sb & "fileExists=" & fso.FileExists(filePath) & vbCrLf
    If Not fso.FileExists(filePath) Then
        TestR2_Diagnose = sb
        If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1157] modEntryUserForm.TestR2_Diagnose EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
        Exit Function
    End If
    Dim sections As Collection
    Set sections = modStanzaIO.ParseStanzaFile(filePath)
    sb = sb & "parsedSections=" & sections.Count & vbCrLf
    Dim i As Long
    For i = 1 To sections.Count
        sb = sb & "  [" & i & "] " & sections.Item(i).SectionName & vbCrLf
    Next i
    TestR2_Diagnose = sb
End Function

' --- Helpers ---

' ADR-0090 (2026-06-01): Resolve "knowledge id" cell via SSOT lookup.
' Active sheet name -> screen ID (modSheetMap.SheetToScreenId) -> for each
' role dir (admin/search/register, CJK names per ADR-0089) try
' LoadUiDefinition; inspect [INPUT] sections for inputDataKey in
' {"kid","knowledgeId","knwId","knowledge_id"} and use that Cell.
' Falls back to legacy B3 hard-code so legacy installs that lack the
' new inputDataKey still work.
Private Function ReadKnowledgeIdFromActiveSheet() As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1158] modEntryUserForm.ReadKnowledgeIdFromActiveSheet ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo Fallback
    Dim ws As Object
    Set ws = ActiveSheet
    If ws Is Nothing Then GoTo Fallback
    Dim cellAddr As String
    cellAddr = ResolveKidCellFromActiveSheet(ws)
    If Len(cellAddr) = 0 Then cellAddr = "B3"
    Dim v As Variant
    v = ws.Range(cellAddr).Value
    If Not IsEmpty(v) Then ReadKnowledgeIdFromActiveSheet = CStr(v)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1159] modEntryUserForm.ReadKnowledgeIdFromActiveSheet EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Exit Function
Fallback:
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim v2 As Variant
    v2 = ActiveSheet.Range("B3").Value
    If Not IsEmpty(v2) Then ReadKnowledgeIdFromActiveSheet = CStr(v2)
    On Error GoTo 0
End Function

' ADR-0090 helper: SSOT-driven kid cell address resolution
' across 3 candidate role dirs (admin/search/register).
Private Function ResolveKidCellFromActiveSheet(ByVal ws As Object) As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1160] modEntryUserForm.ResolveKidCellFromActiveSheet ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error GoTo Fallback
    Dim screenId As String
    screenId = modSheetMap.SheetToScreenId(ws.Name)
    If Len(screenId) = 0 Then GoTo Fallback
    Dim roles(0 To 2) As String
    roles(0) = RoleAdminLocal()
    roles(1) = RoleSearchLocal()
    roles(2) = RoleRegisterLocal()
    Dim r As Long
    For r = 0 To 2
        Dim sections As Collection
        Set sections = modUILoader.LoadUiDefinition(roles(r), screenId)
        If Not sections Is Nothing Then
            If sections.Count > 0 Then
                Dim i As Long
                For i = 1 To sections.Count
                    Dim sec As ClsStanzaSection
                    Set sec = sections.Item(i)
                    If sec.SectionName = "INPUT" Then
                        Dim key As String
                        key = sec.GetValue("inputDataKey")
                        If key = "kid" Or key = "knowledgeId" Or _
                           key = "knwId" Or key = "knowledge_id" Then
                            Dim cellExpr As String
                            cellExpr = sec.GetValue("Cell")
                            If Len(cellExpr) > 0 Then
                                Dim p As Long
                                p = InStr(1, cellExpr, ":")
                                If p > 0 Then
                                    ResolveKidCellFromActiveSheet = Left(cellExpr, p - 1)
                                Else
                                    ResolveKidCellFromActiveSheet = cellExpr
                                End If
                                If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1161] modEntryUserForm.ResolveKidCellFromActiveSheet EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
                                Exit Function
                            End If
                        End If
                    End If
                Next i
            End If
        End If
    Next r
Fallback:
    ResolveKidCellFromActiveSheet = ""
End Function

' ADR-0089/0090 helper Functions (local CJK role dir names)
Private Function RoleAdminLocal() As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1162] modEntryUserForm.RoleAdminLocal ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    RoleAdminLocal = ChrW(&H7BA1) & ChrW(&H7406)
End Function

Private Function RoleSearchLocal() As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1163] modEntryUserForm.RoleSearchLocal ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    RoleSearchLocal = ChrW(&H691C) & ChrW(&H7D22)
End Function

Private Function RoleRegisterLocal() As String
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1164] modEntryUserForm.RoleRegisterLocal ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    RoleRegisterLocal = ChrW(&H767B) & ChrW(&H9332) & ChrW(&H4FEE) & ChrW(&H6B63)
End Function

Private Sub LogShowFormResult(ByVal funcName As String, ByVal ret As String)
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1165] modEntryUserForm.LogShowFormResult ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    On Error Resume Next
    Dim lg As clsLogger
    Set lg = New clsLogger
    lg.Init ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("LOG")
    If ret = "DELETED" Then
        lg.LogInfo "modEntryUserForm", funcName, "knowledge deleted via UserForm", "", "LOG-UF-DELETE"
    ElseIf Len(ret) = 0 Then
        lg.LogInfo "modEntryUserForm", funcName, "form cancelled by user", "", "LOG-UF-CANCEL"
    ElseIf Left(ret, 5) = "EDIT:" Then
        lg.LogInfo "modEntryUserForm", funcName, "view -> edit chain id=" & Mid(ret, 6), "", "LOG-UF-VIEW2EDIT"
    Else
        lg.LogInfo "modEntryUserForm", funcName, "knowledge saved id=" & ret, "", "LOG-UF-SAVE-OK"
    End If
    On Error GoTo 0
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1166] modEntryUserForm.LogShowFormResult EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
End Sub
</code></pre>

docs.title: modFactory.bas
docs.text: 配置先: 共通モジュール（検索.xlsm / 管理.xlsm 共通） 種類: 標準モジュール 更新日: 2026-06-04 12:30 JST

docs.title: 保存方法
docs.text:
下のコードをメモ帳に貼り付け、[名前を付けて保存] で次のように保存してください。

  • 場所: C:\KnowledgeMgr\installer\vba_modules\common\\
  • ファイル名: modFactory.bas
  • ファイルの種類: すべてのファイル
  • 文字コード: ANSI（Shift-JIS）

メモ帳の文字コードを ANSI にしないと、VBA の日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 UTF-8 で保存すると VBA Import 時に日本語が文字化けして動かなくなります。 改行コードは CRLF（Windows 標準）のままで OK です。

docs.title: ソースコード
docs.text:
Attribute VB_Name = "modFactory"
Option Explicit

' ================================================================
' modFactory (v2.3 Phase R-1-j stub, 2026-05-28)
' Original CreateScreen path is legacy + references modules that
' no longer exist in current package (modScreenSpecRegistry,
' clsFormatListScreen, clsMainScreen, etc.) causing project-wide
' compile errors. Stubbed to keep API surface (CreateRenderer +
' CreateScreen) without dead references.
' ================================================================

Public Const RENDERER_KIND_SHEET As String = "sheet"
Public Const RENDERER_KIND_FORM As String = "form"

Public Function CreateRenderer(ByVal kind As String) As IScreenRenderer
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1167] modFactory.CreateRenderer ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Select Case LCase(kind)
        Case RENDERER_KIND_SHEET
            Set CreateRenderer = New clsSheetRenderer
        Case RENDERER_KIND_FORM
            Set CreateRenderer = New clsUserFormRenderer
        Case Else
            Set CreateRenderer = New clsSheetRenderer
    End Select
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1168] modFactory.CreateRenderer EXIT-OK"  ' [ADR-0100]
End Function

' Phase R-1-j: stubbed. Returns Nothing for all screenIds.
Public Function CreateScreen(ByVal screenId As String, _
                              ByVal renderer As IScreenRenderer) As Object
    If modCommon.gDebugLevel >= DEBUG_LEVEL_TRACE Then Debug.Print "[D-1169] modFactory.CreateScreen ENTER"  ' [ADR-0100]
    Set CreateScreen = Nothing
End Function
